sections.heading: Our Company
paragraphs: EFG International is a global private banking group, offering private banking and asset management services. We serve clients in over 40 locations worldwide. EFG International offers a stimulating and dynamic work environment and strives to be an employer of choice.

EFG is committed to providing an equitable and inclusive working environment that is founded on the principle of mutual respect. Joining our team means experiencing a supportive environment, where your contributions are valued and recognised. We strongly believe that the diversity of our teams gives us a competitive advantage by fostering better decision-making and greater innovation.

sections.heading: Our Purpose and Mission
paragraphs: Empowering entrepreneurial minds to create value – today and for the future.

We are a private bank, offering personalised solutions on a global scale to private and institutional clients. Our sustainable success is based on our talents and on how we partner with our clients and communities to create lasting value.

jobs.title: Internship – Business Management, Global Markets & Treasury
jobs.description:
Our Company

EFG International is a global private banking group, offering private banking and asset management services. We serve clients in over 40 locations worldwide. EFG International offers a stimulating and dynamic work environment and strives to be an employer of choice.

Our Purpose and Mission

Empowering entrepreneurial minds to create value – today and for the future.

Job Description

As part of the Business Management team within the Global Markets & Treasury division, you will gain hands-on exposure to how strategic and operational decisions are supported through data, reporting and analysis. Working closely with senior team members, you will contribute to the production of key management information and help ensure that decision-makers have timely, accurate and insightful material at their disposal.

You will be involved in a broad range of activities, from understanding and mapping processes, managing data and dashboards to preparing presentations for senior stakeholders. This role offers an excellent opportunity to develop a solid understanding of Global Markets & Treasury business and associated financial and risk metrics, and experience how a leading financial institution operates on a day-to-day basis.

Main responsibilities

- Understanding, documenting and assisting in improving processes for Global Markets & Treasury.

- Manage and maintain data sources and dashboards, ensuring information is accurate, consistent and up to date.

- Produce regular and ad hoc management reports (financials, risk metrics and KPIs) to support monitoring and decision-making.

- Prepare clear, well-structured presentations for committees, management forums and ad hoc business requests.

- Collaborate with colleagues across functions to gather input, validate data and ensure alignment of information.

Skills and experience

- Graduate student available for six months for internship (required by University) – Depending on the needs of the organisation, the internship may be extended for an additional six month.

- Strong numerical and analytical skills, with a keen attention to detail and data quality.

- Good command of Excel and PowerPoint; familiarity with data visualisation tools (e.g. dashboards) is an advantage.

- Ability to structure information clearly and present it in a concise, visually appealing way.

- Strong communication skills and willingness to interact with different stakeholders.

- Proactive, organised and able to manage multiple tasks and deadlines. Open minded, curious and eager to learn.

- Very good knowledge of written and spoken English; additional national language is an asset.

Our Values

- Accountability : Taking ownership for tasks and challenges, as well as seeking continuous improvement.

- Hands-on : Being proactive to rapidly deliver high-quality results.

- Passionate : Being committed and striving for excellence.

- Solution-driven : Focusing on client outcomes and treating clients fairly with a risk-aware mindset.

- Partnership-oriented : Promoting collaboration and teamwork. Working together with an entrepreneurial spirit..

Please ensure to attach a cover letter to your CV when filling the application.

descriptionByLocale.it:
La nostra azienda EFG International è un gruppo bancario privato globale, che offre servizi di private banking e gestione patrimoniale. Serviamo clienti in oltre 40 sedi in tutto il mondo. EFG International offre un ambiente di lavoro stimolante e dinamico e si impegna a essere un datore di lavoro di riferimento. Il nostro scopo e la nostra missione Dare potere alle menti imprenditoriali per creare valore – oggi e per il futuro. Descrizione del lavoro Come parte del team di Business Management all'interno della divisione Global Markets & Treasury, avrai l'opportunità di acquisire esperienza pratica su come le decisioni strategiche e operative siano supportate attraverso dati, reportistica e analisi. Lavorando a stretto contatto con i membri senior del team, contribuirai alla produzione di informazioni chiave per la gestione e aiuterai a garantire che i decisori abbiano a disposizione materiale tempestivo, accurato e approfondito. Sarai coinvolto in una vasta gamma di attività, dalla comprensione e mappatura dei processi, alla gestione dei dati e dei dashboard, fino alla preparazione di presentazioni per i principali stakeholder. Questo ruolo offre un'eccellente opportunità per sviluppare una solida comprensione del business di Global Markets & Treasury e delle metriche finanziarie e di rischio associate, oltre a sperimentare come opera quotidianamente una delle principali istituzioni finanziarie. Principali responsabilità
- Comprendere, documentare e assistere nel miglioramento dei processi per Global Markets & Treasury.
- Gestire e mantenere fonti di dati e dashboard, garantendo che le informazioni siano accurate, coerenti e aggiornate.
- Produrre report di gestione regolari e ad hoc (dati finanziari, metriche di rischio e KPI) per supportare il monitoraggio e il processo decisionale.
- Preparare presentazioni chiare e ben strutturate per comitati, forum di gestione e richieste aziendali ad hoc.
- Collaborare con colleghi di diverse funzioni per raccogliere input, validare dati e garantire l'allineamento delle informazioni. Competenze ed esperienza
- Studente laureando disponibile per sei mesi di stage (richiesto dall'Università) – A seconda delle esigenze dell'organizzazione, lo stage può essere esteso per ulteriori sei mesi.
- Forti competenze numeriche e analitiche, con grande attenzione ai dettagli e alla qualità dei dati.
- Buona padronanza di Excel e PowerPoint; familiarità con strumenti di visualizzazione dei dati (ad esempio dashboard) è un vantaggio.
- Capacità di strutturare le informazioni in modo chiaro e presentarle in modo conciso e visivamente accattivante.
- Forti capacità comunicative e disponibilità a interagire con diversi stakeholder.
- Proattività, organizzazione e capacità di gestire più compiti e scadenze. Mente aperta, curiosità e voglia di imparare.
- Ottima conoscenza dell'inglese scritto e parlato; una lingua nazionale aggiuntiva è un vantaggio. I nostri valori
- Responsabilità: Assumersi la responsabilità dei compiti e delle sfide, cercando continuamente di migliorare.
- Praticità: Essere proattivi per fornire rapidamente risultati di alta qualità.
- Passione: Essere impegnati e puntare all'eccellenza.
- Orientamento alle soluzioni: Concentrarsi sui risultati per i clienti e trattarli in modo equo con una mentalità consapevole del rischio.
- Orientamento alla partnership: Promuovere la collaborazione e il lavoro di squadra. Lavorare insieme con uno spirito imprenditoriale. Si prega di allegare una lettera di presentazione al CV al momento della candidatura.
descriptionByLocale.de:
Unser Unternehmen EFG International ist eine globale Privatbankengruppe, die Dienstleistungen im Bereich Private Banking und Vermögensverwaltung anbietet. Wir betreuen Kunden an über 40 Standorten weltweit. EFG International bietet ein anregendes und dynamisches Arbeitsumfeld und strebt danach, ein bevorzugter Arbeitgeber zu sein. Unser Zweck und unsere Mission Unternehmerische Köpfe zu befähigen, Wert zu schaffen – heute und in der Zukunft. Stellenbeschreibung Als Teil des Business Management Teams innerhalb der Global Markets & Treasury Division erhalten Sie praktische Einblicke, wie strategische und operative Entscheidungen durch Daten, Berichterstattung und Analysen unterstützt werden. In enger Zusammenarbeit mit erfahrenen Teammitgliedern tragen Sie zur Erstellung von wichtigen Managementinformationen bei und helfen sicherzustellen, dass Entscheidungsträger rechtzeitige, genaue und aufschlussreiche Materialien zur Verfügung haben. Sie werden in eine breite Palette von Aktivitäten eingebunden, von der Analyse und Dokumentation von Prozessen über die Verwaltung von Daten und Dashboards bis hin zur Erstellung von Präsentationen für wichtige Stakeholder. Diese Rolle bietet eine hervorragende Gelegenheit, ein solides Verständnis für das Geschäft von Global Markets & Treasury sowie für die damit verbundenen finanziellen und risikobezogenen Kennzahlen zu entwickeln und zu erleben, wie ein führendes Finanzinstitut im Tagesgeschäft arbeitet. Hauptaufgaben
- Verstehen, Dokumentieren und Unterstützen bei der Verbesserung von Prozessen für Global Markets & Treasury.
- Verwalten und Pflegen von Datenquellen und Dashboards, um sicherzustellen, dass Informationen genau, konsistent und aktuell sind.
- Erstellung regelmäßiger und ad-hoc Managementberichte (Finanzen, Risikokennzahlen und KPIs) zur Unterstützung von Überwachung und Entscheidungsfindung.
- Vorbereitung klarer, gut strukturierter Präsentationen für Ausschüsse, Managementforen und ad-hoc Geschäftsanforderungen.
- Zusammenarbeit mit Kollegen aus verschiedenen Funktionen, um Input zu sammeln, Daten zu validieren und die Abstimmung von Informationen sicherzustellen. Fähigkeiten und Erfahrungen
- Hochschulabsolvent, der für ein sechsmonatiges Praktikum verfügbar ist (erforderlich von der Universität) – Je nach den Bedürfnissen der Organisation kann das Praktikum um weitere sechs Monate verlängert werden.
- Starke numerische und analytische Fähigkeiten mit einem ausgeprägten Auge für Details und Datenqualität.
- Gute Kenntnisse in Excel und PowerPoint; Vertrautheit mit Datenvisualisierungstools (z. B. Dashboards) ist von Vorteil.
- Fähigkeit, Informationen klar zu strukturieren und prägnant sowie visuell ansprechend zu präsentieren.
- Starke Kommunikationsfähigkeiten und Bereitschaft, mit verschiedenen Stakeholdern zu interagieren.
- Proaktiv, organisiert und in der Lage, mehrere Aufgaben und Fristen zu verwalten. Offen, neugierig und lernbereit.
- Sehr gute Kenntnisse in schriftlichem und gesprochenem Englisch; eine zusätzliche Landessprache ist von Vorteil. Unsere Werte
- Verantwortlichkeit: Übernahme von Verantwortung für Aufgaben und Herausforderungen sowie kontinuierliche Verbesserung anstreben.
- Praktisch: Proaktiv sein, um schnell qualitativ hochwertige Ergebnisse zu liefern.
- Leidenschaftlich: Engagiert sein und nach Exzellenz streben.
- Lösungsorientiert: Fokus auf Kundenergebnisse und faire Behandlung der Kunden mit einem risikobewussten Ansatz.
- Partnerschaftsorientiert: Förderung von Zusammenarbeit und Teamarbeit. Zusammenarbeit mit einem unternehmerischen Geist. Bitte fügen Sie ein Anschreiben Ihrem Lebenslauf bei, wenn Sie sich bewerben.
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Notre entreprise EFG International est un groupe bancaire privé mondial, offrant des services de banque privée et de gestion d'actifs. Nous servons des clients dans plus de 40 emplacements à travers le monde. EFG International offre un environnement de travail stimulant et dynamique et s'efforce d'être un employeur de choix. Notre objectif et notre mission Donner aux esprits entrepreneuriaux les moyens de créer de la valeur – aujourd'hui et pour l'avenir. Description du poste En tant que membre de l'équipe de gestion d'entreprise au sein de la division Global Markets & Treasury, vous aurez une exposition pratique à la manière dont les décisions stratégiques et opérationnelles sont soutenues par des données, des rapports et des analyses. En travaillant en étroite collaboration avec des membres seniors de l'équipe, vous contribuerez à la production d'informations clés pour la gestion et aiderez à garantir que les décideurs disposent de matériel opportun, précis et pertinent. Vous serez impliqué dans un large éventail d'activités, allant de la compréhension et de la cartographie des processus, à la gestion des données et des tableaux de bord, en passant par la préparation de présentations pour les parties prenantes seniors. Ce rôle offre une excellente opportunité de développer une compréhension solide des activités de Global Markets & Treasury ainsi que des indicateurs financiers et de risque associés, et de découvrir le fonctionnement quotidien d'une institution financière de premier plan. Principales responsabilités
- Comprendre, documenter et aider à améliorer les processus pour Global Markets & Treasury.
- Gérer et maintenir les sources de données et les tableaux de bord, en veillant à ce que les informations soient exactes, cohérentes et à jour.
- Produire des rapports de gestion réguliers et ad hoc (financiers, indicateurs de risque et KPI) pour soutenir le suivi et la prise de décision.
- Préparer des présentations claires et bien structurées pour les comités, les forums de gestion et les demandes commerciales ad hoc.
- Collaborer avec des collègues de différentes fonctions pour recueillir des contributions, valider les données et garantir l'alignement des informations. Compétences et expérience
- Étudiant diplômé disponible pour un stage de six mois (exigé par l'université) – Selon les besoins de l'organisation, le stage peut être prolongé de six mois supplémentaires.
- Solides compétences en calcul et en analyse, avec une grande attention aux détails et à la qualité des données.
- Bonne maîtrise d'Excel et de PowerPoint ; la familiarité avec les outils de visualisation de données (par exemple, tableaux de bord) est un atout.
- Capacité à structurer clairement les informations et à les présenter de manière concise et visuellement attrayante.
- Excellentes compétences en communication et volonté d'interagir avec différents intervenants.
- Proactif, organisé et capable de gérer plusieurs tâches et échéances. Ouvert d'esprit, curieux et désireux d'apprendre.
- Très bonne maîtrise de l'anglais écrit et parlé ; une langue nationale supplémentaire est un atout. Nos valeurs
- Responsabilité : Assumer la responsabilité des tâches et des défis, tout en cherchant à s'améliorer en permanence.
- Pratique : Être proactif pour livrer rapidement des résultats de haute qualité.
- Passionné : Être engagé et viser l'excellence.
- Orienté solutions : Se concentrer sur les résultats pour les clients et les traiter équitablement avec une approche consciente des risques.
- Orienté partenariat : Promouvoir la collaboration et le travail d'équipe. Travailler ensemble avec un esprit entrepreneurial. Veuillez joindre une lettre de motivation à votre CV lors de votre candidature.

summary:
Our Company

EFG International is a global private banking group, offering private banking and asset management services. We serve clients in over 40 locations worldwide. EFG International offers a stimulating and dynamic work environment and strives to be an employer of choice.

EFG is committed to providing an equitable and inclusive working environment that is founded on the principle of mutual respect. Joining our team means experiencing a supportive environment, where your contributions are valued and recognised. We strongly believe that the diversity of our teams gives us a competitive advantage by fostering better decision-making and greater innovation.

Our Purpose and Mission

Empowering entrepreneurial minds to create value – today and for the future.

We are a private bank, offering personalised solutions on a global scale to private and institutional clients. Our sustainable success is based on our talents and on how we partner with our clients and communities to create lasting value.

Job Description

As part of the Business Management team within the Global Markets & Treasury division, you will gain hands-on exposure to how strategic and operational decisions are supported through data, reporting and analysis. Working closely with senior team members, you will contribute to the production of key management information and help ensure that decision-makers have timely, accurate and insightful material at their disposal.

You will be involved in a broad range of activities, from understanding and mapping processes, managing data and dashboards to preparing presentations for senior stakeholders. This role offers an excellent opportunity to develop a solid understanding of Global Markets & Treasury business and associated financial and risk metrics, and experience how a leading financial institution operates on a day-to-day basis.

Main responsibilities

  • Understanding, documenting and assisting in improving processes for Global Markets & Treasury.
  • Manage and maintain data sources and dashboards, ensuring information is accurate, consistent and up to date.
  • Produce regular and ad hoc management reports (financials, risk metrics and KPIs) to support monitoring and decision-making.
  • Prepare clear, well-structured presentations for committees, management forums and ad hoc business requests.
  • Collaborate with colleagues across functions to gather input, validate data and ensure alignment of information.

Skills and experience

  • Graduate student available for six months for internship (required by University) – Depending on the needs of the organisation, the internship may be extended for an additional six month.
  • Strong numerical and analytical skills, with a keen attention to detail and data quality.
  • Good command of Excel and PowerPoint; familiarity with data visualisation tools (e.g. dashboards) is an advantage.
  • Ability to structure information clearly and present it in a concise, visually appealing way.
  • Strong communication skills and willingness to interact with different stakeholders.
  • Proactive, organised and able to manage multiple tasks and deadlines. Open minded, curious and eager to learn.
  • Very good knowledge of written and spoken English; additional national language is an asset.

Our Values

  • Accountability: Taking ownership for tasks and challenges, as well as seeking continuous improvement.
  • Hands-on: Being proactive to rapidly deliver high-quality results.
  • Passionate: Being committed and striving for excellence.
  • Solution-driven: Focusing on client outcomes and treating clients fairly with a risk-aware mindset.
  • Partnership-oriented: Promoting collaboration and teamwork. Working together with an entrepreneurial spirit..

Please ensure to attach a cover letter to your CV when filling the application.

jobs.title: Client Support Officer
jobs.description:
General Info

-
Work time Percentage : 100%

-
Location : St Moritz

## Job Description

To support our growing activities in St. Moritz, we are looking for a Client Service Officer who will provide high-quality administrative and client service support to our Client Relationship Officers (CROs), while also contributing to the smooth running of our front office reception and cashier operations.

This role is ideal for a service-oriented, hands-on professional who enjoys working in a dynamic, international private banking environment and who is motivated to take ownership, act proactively and deliver an outstanding client experience.

## Main Responsibilities

## 1. Client and CRO Support

-
Support clients and CROs in their daily business activities.

-
Maintain active client contact in written and spoken German and English.

-
Provide top-quality service to clients through regular and prompt contact by phone and email.

-
## Execute client account openings, closures and updates, including

-
Conducting internet searches and basic due diligence checks.

-
Collecting and verifying corroborative documentation.

-
## Prepare and follow up on client visits, including

-
Preparing account documentation and reviewing documents.

-
Organising account statements and other supporting material.

-
## Execute and control client instructions, such as

-
Stock market transactions.

-
Payments and transfers.

-
Foreign currency trades.

-
## Perform various administrative and organisational tasks, including

-
Client reviews and periodic checks.

-
Follow-up on missing or pending documents.

-
Delivery and monitoring of hold mail.

-
## Prepare marketing and client materials, such as

-
Presentations and pitchbooks.

-
Investment proposals & portfolio reviews.

-
Actively promote paperless accounts and e-banking usage to clients.

-
Ensure full compliance with the Code of Conduct and all internal regulations (e.g. Cross Border, AML, Clear & Clean Desk Policy, Absence Management).

## 2. Reception and Front Office Support

-
Welcome and assist clients upon arrival, ensuring a professional and warm first impression.

-
## Manage reception duties, including

-
Answering and directing phone calls.

-
Handling appointments and coordinating meeting room bookings.

-
Prepare and serve beverages to clients and ensure a high standard of hospitality.

-
Ensure meeting rooms and client areas are tidy, well-presented and adequately equipped at all times.

-
Handle incoming and outgoing mail and deliveries, ensuring timely distribution and proper documentation.

## 3. Cashier and Branch Support

-
## Support daily cashier operations, including

-
Processing client deposits and withdrawals.

-
Handling basic cash and payment transactions in line with internal guidelines.

-
Collaborate closely with CROs and other team members to ensure smooth branch operations.

-
Support marketing and client events, including preparation, logistics and on-site assistance.

## Skills and experience

-
Education and Professional Background

-
Commercial apprenticeship in a bank or similar banking-related education.

-
Further education in the financial sector is an advantage.

-
Minimum 3 years of experience in a private banking or intermediary environment.

-
Skills

-
## Good understanding of financial instruments, including

-
Equities, bonds, structured products and derivatives.

-
Solid knowledge of Compliance and AML topics relevant to private banking.

-
Confident user of Microsoft Office (Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, Word).

-
Familiarity with banking systems and front-office tools is an asset.

-
Strong client service orientation with excellent interpersonal skills.

-
High level of reliability, discretion and integrity.

-
Ability to cope with pressure and tight deadlines, with a flexible approach to working hours when required.

-
Comfortable working in a small branch environment, taking on a broad range of tasks (from client administration to reception and cashier support).

-
Proficient in written and spoken German and English (essential).

-
Italian is a strong plus; any additional languages are an advantage.

## Our Values

-
Accountability : Taking ownership for tasks and challenges, as well as seeking continuous improvement

-
Hands-on : Being proactive to rapidly deliver high-quality results

-
Passionate : Being committed and striving for excellence

-
Solution-driven : Focusing on client outcomes and treating clients fairly with a risk-aware mindset

-
Partnership-oriented : Promoting collaboration and teamwork. Working together with an entrepreneurial spirit.

-
Please ensure to attach a cover letter to your CV when filling the application.

## Application

-
Should you wish to apply for this position use this link to apply.

descriptionByLocale.it:
Informazioni Generali
- Percentuale di lavoro: 100%
- Luogo: St. Moritz

## Descrizione del Lavoro Per supportare le nostre crescenti attività a St. Moritz, stiamo cercando un Addetto al Supporto Clienti che fornirà supporto amministrativo e di servizio clienti di alta qualità ai nostri Responsabili delle Relazioni con i Clienti (CRO), contribuendo anche al buon funzionamento della nostra reception e delle operazioni di cassa. Questo ruolo è ideale per un professionista orientato al servizio, con esperienza pratica, che ama lavorare in un ambiente dinamico e internazionale di private banking e che è motivato a prendere responsabilità, agire proattivamente e fornire un'esperienza cliente eccezionale.

## Principali Responsabilità

## 1. Supporto Clienti e CRO
- Supportare i clienti e i CRO nelle loro attività quotidiane.
- Mantenere un contatto attivo con i clienti in tedesco e inglese scritto e parlato.
- Fornire un servizio di alta qualità ai clienti attraverso contatti regolari e tempestivi telefonici e via email.
- Eseguire aperture, chiusure e aggiornamenti di conti clienti, incluso:
- Condurre ricerche su internet e controlli di due diligence di base.
- Raccogliere e verificare documentazione corroborativa.
- Preparare e seguire le visite dei clienti, incluso:
- Preparare documentazione di conto e esaminare documenti.
- Organizzare estratti conto e altro materiale di supporto.
- Eseguire e controllare istruzioni dei clienti, come:
- Transazioni sul mercato azionario.
- Pagamenti e trasferimenti.
- Operazioni in valuta estera.
- Eseguire varie attività amministrative e organizzative, incluso:
- Revisioni dei clienti e controlli periodici.
- Seguire documenti mancanti o pendenti.
- Consegna e monitoraggio della posta in sospeso.
- Preparare materiali di marketing e clienti, come:
- Presentazioni e pitchbook.
- Proposte di investimento e revisioni di portafoglio.
- Promuovere attivamente conti senza carta e utilizzo di e-banking ai clienti.
- Assicurare la piena conformità con il Codice di Condotta e tutte le regolamentazioni interne (ad es. Cross Border, AML, Clear & Clean Desk Policy, Gestione delle Assenze).

## 2. Supporto Reception e Front Office
- Accogliere e assistere i clienti al loro arrivo, assicurando un'impressione professionale e calorosa.
- Gestire le responsabilità di reception, incluso:
- Rispondere e indirizzare le chiamate telefoniche.
- Gestire appuntamenti e prenotazioni di sale riunioni.
- Preparare e servire bevande ai clienti e assicurare un alto livello di ospitalità.
- Assicurare che le sale riunioni e le aree clienti siano ordinate, ben presentate e adeguatamente attrezzate in ogni momento.
- Gestire la posta in entrata e in uscita e le consegne, assicurando una distribuzione tempestiva e una corretta documentazione.

## 3. Supporto Cassa e Filiale
- Supportare le operazioni quotidiane di cassa, incluso:
- Elaborare depositi e prelievi dei clienti.
- Gestire transazioni di cassa e pagamento di base in linea con le linee guida interne.
- Collaborare strettamente con i CRO e altri membri del team per assicurare operazioni di filiale senza problemi.
- Supportare eventi di marketing e clienti, incluso preparazione, logistica e assistenza sul luogo.

## Competenze ed esperienza
- Istruzione e Esperienza Professionale
- Apprendistato commerciale in un banco o istruzione simile legata al settore bancario.
- Ulteriore istruzione nel settore finanziario è un vantaggio.
- Almeno 3 anni di esperienza in un ambiente di private banking o intermediario.
- Competenze
- Buona comprensione degli strumenti finanziari, incluso:
- Azioni, obbligazioni, prodotti strutturati e derivati.
- Solida conoscenza degli argomenti di Compliance e AML rilevanti per il private banking.
- Utente sicuro di Microsoft Office (Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, Word).
- Familiarità con sistemi bancari e strumenti di front-office è un vantaggio.
- Forte orientamento al servizio clienti con eccellenti competenze interpersonali.
- Alto livello di affidabilità, discrezione e integrità.
- Capacità di far fronte alla pressione e ai tempi stretti, con un approccio flessibile agli orari di lavoro quando necessario.
- Comfortevole lavorando in un ambiente di filiale piccolo, assumendo un'ampia gamma di compiti (da amministrazione clienti a supporto reception e cassa).
- Proficiente in tedesco e inglese scritto e parlato (essenziale).
- Italiano è un forte vantaggio; qualsiasi lingua aggiuntiva è un vantaggio.

## Nostri Valori
- Responsabilità: Assumere la proprietà di compiti e sfide, nonché cercare un miglioramento continuo
- Pratico: Essere proattivi per fornire risultati di alta qualità rapidamente
- Passionale: Essere impegnati e sforzarsi per l'eccellenza
- Soluzione-orientato: Focalizzarsi sui risultati dei clienti e trattarli in modo equo con una mentalità consapevole del rischio
- Orientato alla partnership: Promuovere la collaborazione e il lavoro di squadra. Lavorare insieme con uno spirito imprenditoriale.
- Si prega di allegare una lettera di presentazione al proprio CV quando si invia la domanda.

## Candidatura
- Se si desidera candidarsi per questa posizione, utilizzare questo link per inviare la domanda.
descriptionByLocale.de:
Allgemeine Informationen
- Arbeitszeitprozentsatz: 100%
- Standort: St. Moritz

## Stellenbeschreibung Um unsere wachsenden Aktivitäten in St. Moritz zu unterstützen, suchen wir einen Kundenbetreuer, der unseren Kundenbeziehungsbeamten (CROs) qualitativ hochwertige administrative und kundenorientierte Unterstützung bietet und gleichzeitig zum reibungslosen Ablauf unserer Front-Office-Rezeption und Kassenoperationen beiträgt. Diese Rolle ist ideal für einen serviceorientierten, praxisorientierten Fachmann, der gerne in einer dynamischen, internationalen Private-Banking-Umgebung arbeitet und motiviert ist, Verantwortung zu übernehmen, proaktiv zu handeln und eine herausragende Kundenerfahrung zu liefern.

## Hauptverantwortungen

## 1. Kunden- und CRO-Unterstützung
- Kunden und CROs bei ihren täglichen Geschäftsaktivitäten unterstützen.
- Aktiven Kundenkontakt in schriftlichem und gesprochenem Deutsch und Englisch aufrechterhalten.
- Kunden durch regelmäßige und prompte Kontakte per Telefon und E-Mail erstklassigen Service bieten.
- Kundenkontenöffnungen, -schließungen und -aktualisierungen ausführen, einschließlich:
- Durchführen von Internetrecherchen und grundlegenden Due-Diligence-Überprüfungen.
- Sammeln und Überprüfen von korroborativen Dokumentationen.
- Kundenbesuche vorbereiten und nachverfolgen, einschließlich:
- Vorbereiten von Kontodokumentationen und Überprüfen von Dokumenten.
- Organisieren von Kontoauszügen und anderen unterstützenden Materialien.
- Kundenanweisungen ausführen und kontrollieren, wie z.B.:
- Börsentransaktionen.
- Zahlungen und Überweisungen.
- Devisengeschäfte.
- Verschiedene administrative und organisatorische Aufgaben ausführen, einschließlich:
- Kundenüberprüfungen und periodische Kontrollen.
- Nachverfolgen von fehlenden oder anhängigen Dokumenten.
- Zustellung und Überwachung von Post.
- Marketing- und Kundenmaterialien vorbereiten, wie z.B.:
- Präsentationen und Pitchbooks.
- Investitionsvorschläge und Portfolioüberprüfungen.
- Aktive Förderung von papierlosen Konten und E-Banking-Nutzung bei Kunden.
- Sicherstellung der vollen Einhaltung des Verhaltenskodex und aller internen Vorschriften (z.B. Cross Border, AML, Clear & Clean Desk Policy, Abwesenheitsmanagement).

## 2. Rezeption und Front-Office-Unterstützung
- Kunden bei ihrer Ankunft begrüßen und unterstützen, um einen professionellen und warmen ersten Eindruck zu hinterlassen.
- Rezeptionsaufgaben verwalten, einschließlich:
- Telefonanrufe beantworten und weiterleiten.
- Termine und Besprechungsraumreservierungen koordinieren.
- Getränke für Kunden vorbereiten und servieren und einen hohen Standard an Gastfreundschaft sicherstellen.
- Besprechungsräume und Kundenbereiche sicherstellen, dass sie jederzeit ordentlich, gut präsentiert und angemessen ausgestattet sind.
- Eingang und Ausgang von Post und Lieferungen bearbeiten, um eine zeitnahe Verteilung und ordnungsgemäße Dokumentation sicherzustellen.

## 3. Kassen- und Filialunterstützung
- Tägliche Kassenoperationen unterstützen, einschließlich:
- Bearbeitung von Kundeneinzahlungen und -abhebungen.
- Grundlegende Bargeld- und Zahlungstransaktionen in Übereinstimmung mit internen Richtlinien durchführen.
- Eng mit CROs und anderen Teammitgliedern zusammenarbeiten, um einen reibungslosen Filialbetrieb sicherzustellen.
- Marketing- und Kundenveranstaltungen unterstützen, einschließlich Vorbereitung, Logistik und Vor-Ort-Unterstützung.

## Fähigkeiten und Erfahrung
- Ausbildung und Berufserfahrung
- Kaufmännische Lehre in einer Bank oder ähnliche bankbezogene Ausbildung.
- Weitere Ausbildung im Finanzsektor ist von Vorteil.
- Mindestens 3 Jahre Erfahrung in einer Private-Banking- oder Vermittlungsumgebung.
- Fähigkeiten
- Gutes Verständnis von Finanzinstrumenten, einschließlich:
- Aktien, Anleihen, strukturierte Produkte und Derivate.
- Solide Kenntnisse von Compliance- und AML-Themen im Private Banking.
- Sichere Anwendung von Microsoft Office (Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, Word).
- Vertrautheit mit Bankensystemen und Front-Office-Tools ist ein Vorteil.
- Starke Kundenorientierung mit hervorragenden zwischenmenschlichen Fähigkeiten.
- Hoher Grad an Zuverlässigkeit, Diskretion und Integrität.
- Fähigkeit, unter Druck und mit engen Terminen umzugehen, mit flexiblem Ansatz bei der Arbeitszeitgestaltung bei Bedarf.
- Wohlbefinden bei der Arbeit in einer kleinen Filiale, Übernahme einer breiten Palette von Aufgaben (von Kundenadministration bis hin zu Rezeptions- und Kassensupport).
- Sicher in Deutsch und Englisch (schriftlich und mündlich).
- Italienisch ist ein starkes Plus; weitere Sprachen sind von Vorteil.

## Unsere Werte
- Verantwortung: Übernahme von Verantwortung für Aufgaben und Herausforderungen sowie kontinuierliche Verbesserung
- Praxisorientiert: Proaktiv sein, um qualitativ hochwertige Ergebnisse schnell zu liefern
- Leidenschaftlich: Engagiert sein und nach Exzellenz streben
- Lösungsorientiert: Konzentration auf Kundenergebnisse und faire Behandlung von Kunden mit einem risikobewussten Mindset
- Partnerschaftlich: Förderung von Zusammenarbeit und Teamarbeit. Zusammenarbeiten mit einem unternehmerischen Geist.
- Bitte fügen Sie einen Lebenslauf bei, wenn Sie sich bewerben.

## Bewerbung
- Wenn Sie sich für diese Position bewerben möchten, verwenden Sie diesen Link, um Ihre Bewerbung abzusenden.
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Informations générales
- Pourcentage de temps de travail : 100%
- Lieu : St. Moritz

## Description du poste Pour soutenir nos activités croissantes à St. Moritz, nous recherchons un agent de support client qui fournira un soutien administratif et de service client de haute qualité à nos responsables de relations avec les clients (CRO), tout en contribuant au bon fonctionnement de notre réception et de nos opérations de caisse. Ce rôle est idéal pour un professionnel orienté vers le service, pratique, qui aime travailler dans un environnement dynamique et international de banque privée et qui est motivé pour prendre des responsabilités, agir de manière proactive et fournir une expérience client exceptionnelle.

## Principales responsabilités

## 1. Support client et CRO
- Soutenir les clients et les CRO dans leurs activités quotidiennes.
- Maintenir un contact actif avec les clients en allemand et en anglais écrit et parlé.
- Fournir un service de haute qualité aux clients par des contacts réguliers et rapides par téléphone et par e-mail.
- Exécuter les ouvertures, fermetures et mises à jour de comptes clients, y compris :
- Effectuer des recherches sur Internet et des vérifications de diligence raisonnable de base.
- Collecter et vérifier les documents corroborants.
- Préparer et suivre les visites de clients, y compris :
- Préparer la documentation de compte et examiner les documents.
- Organiser les relevés de compte et autres documents à l'appui.
- Exécuter et contrôler les instructions des clients, telles que :
- Transactions boursières.
- Paiements et transferts.
- Opérations de change.
- Effectuer diverses tâches administratives et organisationnelles, y compris :
- Examens de clients et contrôles périodiques.
- Suivi des documents manquants ou en attente.
- Livraison et surveillance de la correspondance.
- Préparer des documents de marketing et de clientèle, tels que :
- Présentations et pitchbooks.
- Propositions d'investissement et examens de portefeuille.
- Promouvoir activement les comptes sans papier et l'utilisation de l'e-banking auprès des clients.
- Assurer la pleine conformité avec le Code de conduite et toutes les réglementations internes (par exemple, Cross Border, AML, Clear & Clean Desk Policy, Gestion des absences).

## 2. Support de réception et de front-office
- Accueillir et assister les clients à leur arrivée, en veillant à ce que la première impression soit professionnelle et chaleureuse.
- Gérer les tâches de réception, y compris :
- Répondre et diriger les appels téléphoniques.
- Coordonner les rendez-vous et les réservations de salles de réunion.
- Préparer et servir des boissons aux clients et assurer un niveau élevé d'hospitalité.
- Assurer que les salles de réunion et les zones clients sont toujours propres, bien présentées et équipées de manière adéquate.
- Gérer la correspondance entrante et sortante et les livraisons, en veillant à ce que la distribution soit effectuée en temps opportun et que la documentation soit correcte.

## 3. Support de caisse et de succursale
- Soutenir les opérations quotidiennes de caisse, y compris :
- Traiter les dépôts et les retraits de clients.
- Effectuer des transactions de base en espèces et en paiements conformément aux directives internes.
- Collaborer étroitement avec les CRO et d'autres membres de l'équipe pour assurer le bon fonctionnement de la succursale.
- Soutenir les événements de marketing et de clientèle, y compris la préparation, la logistique et l'assistance sur place.

## Compétences et expérience
- Formation et expérience professionnelle
- Apprentissage commercial dans une banque ou une formation similaire liée au secteur bancaire.
- Formation supplémentaire dans le secteur financier est un avantage.
- Au moins 3 ans d'expérience dans un environnement de banque privée ou d'intermédiation.
- Compétences
- Bonne compréhension des instruments financiers, y compris :
- Actions, obligations, produits structurés et dérivés.
- Solide connaissance des sujets de conformité et de lutte contre le blanchiment d'argent (AML) pertinents pour la banque privée.
- Utilisateur expérimenté de Microsoft Office (Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, Word).
- Familiarité avec les systèmes bancaires et les outils de front-office est un atout.
- Forte orientation client avec d'excellentes compétences interpersonnelles.
- Niveau élevé de fiabilité, de discrétion et d'intégrité.
- Capacité à faire face à la pression et aux délais serrés, avec une approche flexible de l'aménagement du temps de travail si nécessaire.
- À l'aise pour travailler dans un petit environnement de succursale, en assumant un large éventail de tâches (de l'administration client au support de réception et de caisse).
- Courant en allemand et en anglais (écrit et parlé).
- L'italien est un plus; toute langue supplémentaire est un avantage.

## Nos valeurs
- Responsabilité : Prendre en charge les tâches et les défis, ainsi que rechercher une amélioration continue
- Pratique : Être proactif pour fournir des résultats de haute qualité rapidement
- Passionné : Être engagé et s'efforcer d'atteindre l'excellence
- Orienté vers la solution : Se concentrer sur les résultats des clients et traiter les clients de manière équitable avec un esprit de gestion des risques
- Orienté vers le partenariat : Promouvoir la collaboration et le travail d'équipe. Travailler ensemble avec un esprit entrepreneurial.
- Veuillez joindre une lettre de motivation à votre CV lors de votre candidature.

## Candidature
- Si vous souhaitez postuler à ce poste, utilisez ce lien pour envoyer votre candidature.

summary:
General Info

  • Work time Percentage: 100%

  • Location: St Moritz

Our Company

EFG International is a global private banking group, offering private banking and asset management services. We serve clients in over 40 locations worldwide. EFG International offers a stimulating and dynamic work environment and strives to be an employer of choice.

EFG is committed to providing an equitable and inclusive working environment that is founded on the principle of mutual respect. Joining our team means experiencing a supportive environment, where your contributions are valued and recognised. We strongly believe that the diversity of our teams gives us a competitive advantage by fostering better decision-making and greater innovation.

Our Purpose and Mission

Empowering entrepreneurial minds to create value – today and for the future.

We are a private bank, offering personalised solutions on a global scale to private and institutional clients. Our sustainable success is based on our talents and on how we partner with our clients and communities to create lasting value.

Job Description

To support our growing activities in St. Moritz, we are looking for a Client Service Officer who will provide high-quality administrative and client service support to our Client Relationship Officers (CROs), while also contributing to the smooth running of our front office reception and cashier operations.

This role is ideal for a service-oriented, hands-on professional who enjoys working in a dynamic, international private banking environment and who is motivated to take ownership, act proactively and deliver an outstanding client experience.

Main Responsibilities

1. Client and CRO Support

  • Support clients and CROs in their daily business activities.

  • Maintain active client contact in written and spoken German and English.

  • Provide top-quality service to clients through regular and prompt contact by phone and email.

  • Execute client account openings, closures and updates, including:

    • Conducting internet searches and basic due diligence checks.

    • Collecting and verifying corroborative documentation.

  • Prepare and follow up on client visits, including:

    • Preparing account documentation and reviewing documents.

    • Organising account statements and other supporting material.

  • Execute and control client instructions, such as:

    • Stock market transactions.

    • Payments and transfers.

    • Foreign currency trades.

  • Perform various administrative and organisational tasks, including:

    • Client reviews and periodic checks.

    • Follow-up on missing or pending documents.

    • Delivery and monitoring of hold mail.

  • Prepare marketing and client materials, such as:

    • Presentations and pitchbooks.

    • Investment proposals & portfolio reviews.

  • Actively promote paperless accounts and e-banking usage to clients.

  • Ensure full compliance with the Code of Conduct and all internal regulations (e.g. Cross Border, AML, Clear & Clean Desk Policy, Absence Management).

2. Reception and Front Office Support

  • Welcome and assist clients upon arrival, ensuring a professional and warm first impression.

  • Manage reception duties, including:

    • Answering and directing phone calls.

    • Handling appointments and coordinating meeting room bookings.

    • Prepare and serve beverages to clients and ensure a high standard of hospitality.

    • Ensure meeting rooms and client areas are tidy, well-presented and adequately equipped at all times.

    • Handle incoming and outgoing mail and deliveries, ensuring timely distribution and proper documentation.

3. Cashier and Branch Support

  • Support daily cashier operations, including:

  • Processing client deposits and withdrawals.

  • Handling basic cash and payment transactions in line with internal guidelines.

  • Collaborate closely with CROs and other team members to ensure smooth branch operations.

  • Support marketing and client events, including preparation, logistics and on-site assistance.

Skills and experience

  1. Education and Professional Background

  • Commercial apprenticeship in a bank or similar banking-related education.

  • Further education in the financial sector is an advantage.

  • Minimum 3 years of experience in a private banking or intermediary environment.

  1. Skills

  • Good understanding of financial instruments, including:

  • Equities, bonds, structured products and derivatives.

  • Solid knowledge of Compliance and AML topics relevant to private banking.

  • Confident user of Microsoft Office (Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, Word).

  • Familiarity with banking systems and front-office tools is an asset.

  • Strong client service orientation with excellent interpersonal skills.

  • High level of reliability, discretion and integrity.

  • Ability to cope with pressure and tight deadlines, with a flexible approach to working hours when required.

  • Comfortable working in a small branch environment, taking on a broad range of tasks (from client administration to reception and cashier support).

  • Proficient in written and spoken German and English (essential).

  • Italian is a strong plus; any additional languages are an advantage.

Our Values

  • Accountability: Taking ownership for tasks and challenges, as well as seeking continuous improvement

  • Hands-on: Being proactive to rapidly deliver high-quality results

  • Passionate: Being committed and striving for excellence

  • Solution-driven: Focusing on client outcomes and treating clients fairly with a risk-aware mindset

  • Partnership-oriented: Promoting collaboration and teamwork. Working together with an entrepreneurial spirit.

  1. Please ensure to attach a cover letter to your CV when filling the application.

Application

  1. Should you wish to apply for this position use this link to apply.

sections.heading: Jon Description
paragraphs:
This role sits at the heart of our private banking risk and control framework, acting as a key partner to Client Relationship Officers and senior management. Ensuring that client onboarding, lifecycle management and transactional activities are conducted in line with internal standards and local regulatory expectations. Combining strong technical expertise in compliance and due diligence with the ability to influence and guide front-office teams, the role provides independent challenge, clear advice and pragmatic solutions on complex and high‑risk situations. The successful candidate will play a visible part in strengthening our first line of defence, enhancing the quality and consistency of controls, and contributing to a culture of robust risk management across the platform.

Main responsibilities
Support the Client Relationship Officers in proactively identifying, managing and mitigating risks arising from day-to-day business activities
Coordinate the control activity in line with the Global Private Banking Control Blueprint, though aligned to local regulatory requirements
Perform due diligence on prospective and existing client relationships
Approve funds and securities transfers, credit granting, overrides and transactions involving sanctions sensitivity
Distribute market knowledge and best practices among Client Relationship Officers, Client Service Officers and Account Managers
Build trusted working relationships with Senior Management and CROs

Contribute effectively not only to core duties but also in the additional responsibilities including deputizing the HOPBS, reviewing complex cases, and presenting confidently to various senior Management stakeholders.
Being the main point of CRO Contact for complex and High-Risk cases
Be the FLOD Single Point of Contact (SPOC) and gatekeeper when it comes to matters related to PEP Classification and Declassification
Ensure timely completion and remediation of pending follow-ups relating to client lifecycle activities
Approve clients and business introducers new accounts, oversee KYC lifecycle and periodic reviews within the authority delegated by HoPB, ensuring oversight and compliance standards are met
Act as a key link between FLOD and SLOD, ensuring consistent communication and escalation paths including networking with key contact persons within the organization

Review account openings, CIP modifications and periodic reviews for the Dubai PBS team, while providing guidance to strengthen their understanding of requirements and control standards. Through continuous support and best practice sharing, help the team develop the capability to perform these reviews independently.
To represent the HOPBS and the Team with credibility, whether deputizing in meetings, presenting to senior stakeholders, or managing complex reviews.
Skills and experience
University degree in Business Administration, Finance, Law, Economics or related field is essential;
Minimum 5 years of previous Compliance or Audit experience in the area of account openings, account reviews and transaction monitoring;
Strong analytical skills;
Strong communication skills, including the ability to deal with potentially contentious issues effectively;
Ability to work under pressure in a fast-paced environment, flexible, multitask;
Excellent knowledge of written and spoken English. Working knowledge of French and German would be an advantage.

jobs.title: BI Solution Specialist
jobs.description:
## Main responsibilities

- Designing, building and maintaining business and management information data infrastructure

- Developing reporting and analytics solutions to turn data into actionable business insights

- Playing a key role in enhancing the team’s data mining capabilities and acting as a data expert, providing guidance on data processing and analysis

- Staying abreast of key technical developments and trends (e.g. AI, cloud technologies) and assessing their relevance for the Group’s data and analytics landscape

## Skills and experience

- University degree in Business, Data Science, Computer Science or Engineering

- Advanced level in data visualisation tools such as Power Query, Power BI, Tableau or similar

- Advanced knowledge of SQL and Python for database querying and data extraction

- Analytical and structured mindset with strong communication skills

- Practical, hands‑on and problem‑solving aptitude

- Future‑oriented mindset and proactive approach to technical developments and trends in a dynamic environment
   Our Values

  Accountability : Taking ownership for tasks and challenges, as well as seeking continuous improvement

  Hands-on : Being proactive to rapidly deliver high-quality results

  Passionate : Being committed and striving for excellence

  Solution-driven : Focusing on client outcomes and treating clients fairly with a risk-aware mindset

  Partnership-oriented : Promoting collaboration and teamwork. Working together with an entrepreneurial spirit.

jobs.title: Operational Risk Analyst
jobs.description:
## Job Description

The position of Operational Risk Analyst sits within the Operational Risk function and focuses on strengthening the bank’s risk management and internal control framework globally. Acting as a key risk partner to the first line of defence, the position provides independent challenge and oversight on operational risks, ensuring that processes, systems and activities are managed in line with the bank’s risk appetite.

 Location: Lugano, Zurich, Geneva.

  Main responsibilities

-  Oversee the effective and consistent implementation and maintenance of the risk and control management framework globally.

-  Contribute to thematic risk and control assessments on a broad range of issues, including back and middle-office, funds, securities, payments, corporate actions, and order execution through collaboration with other stakeholders.

-  Perform process-level walkthroughs and control testing to enable the identification and assessment of risks and controls.

-  Proactively escalate and effectively communicate material control weaknesses, closely collaborate with key stakeholders in the relevant functions to define appropriate action plans and oversee their timely implementation.

-  Provide expertise and make recommendations for improvements to steer adherence to internal regulations, regulatory requirements and industry best practices.
   Skills and experience

-  Master’s degree in Business Administration, Economics, or a technical field (Science, Technology, Engineering, Mathematics).

-  At least 5 to 7 years of experience in the banking sector (ideally in Risk Control, Audit, or Business Risk Management), or in consulting/audit with a leading professional services firm; a combination of both is considered an advantage.

-  Strong understanding of banking processes and systems, products, and related regulatory requirements. Expertise with core banking systems and Front systems is a plus.

-  Excellent communication skills in English, both verbal and written. Knowledge of German, French, or Italian is a plus.

-  Proven ability to write reports and communicate effectively with a senior audience.

-  Self-motivated, diligent, highly organized, able to prioritize and multi-task, and thrive in a fast-paced environment.

-  Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills, able to work autonomously and as part of a global team.

-  Innovative mindset, with the ability to identify opportunities for process improvement and operational efficiency.
   Our Values

  Accountability : Taking ownership for tasks and challenges, as well as seeking continuous improvement

  Hands-on : Being proactive to rapidly deliver high-quality results

  Passionate : Being committed and striving for excellence

  Solution-driven : Focusing on client outcomes and treating clients fairly with a risk-aware mindset

  Partnership-oriented : Promoting collaboration and teamwork. Working together with an entrepreneurial spirit.

  Partnership-oriented : Promoting collaboration and teamwork. Working together with an entrepreneurial spirit.
descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione del Lavoro La posizione di Analista del Rischio Operativo si colloca all’interno della funzione di Rischio Operativo e si concentra sul rafforzamento del framework di gestione del rischio e di controllo interno della banca a livello globale. Agendo come partner chiave di rischio per la prima linea di difesa, la posizione fornisce sfide e supervisione indipendenti sui rischi operativi, garantendo che processi, sistemi e attività siano gestiti in linea con l’appetito al rischio della banca. Main responsibilities
- Supervisionare l’implementazione efficace e coerente e la manutenzione del framework di gestione del rischio e dei controlli a livello globale;
- Contribuire a valutazioni tematiche di rischio e controllo su una vasta gamma di questioni, inclusi back e middle-office, fondi, titoli, pagamenti, azioni societarie e esecuzione degli ordini attraverso la collaborazione con altri stakeholder;
- Eseguire walkthrough dei processi e test di controllo a livello di processo per consentire l’identificazione e la valutazione dei rischi e dei controlli.
- Escalation proattiva e comunicazione efficace delle debolezze di controllo materiali, collaborazione stretta con i principali stakeholder nelle funzioni rilevanti per definire piani d’azione appropriati e supervisionarne l’implementazione tempestiva.
- Fornire competenze e raccomandazioni per miglioramenti al fine di garantire l’adesione alle normative interne, ai requisiti normativi e alle migliori pratiche del settore. Skills and experience
- Laurea magistrale in Economia, Amministrazione Aziendale o campo tecnico (Scienze, Tecnologia, Ingegneria, Matematica).
- Almeno 5-7 anni di esperienza nel settore bancario (idealmente in Controllo del Rischio, Audit o Gestione del Rischio Aziendale), o in consulenza/audit presso una società di servizi professionali leader; una combinazione di entrambe è considerata un vantaggio.
- Solida comprensione dei processi e sistemi bancari, prodotti e requisiti normativi correlati. Competenza con sistemi bancari core e sistemi front-end è un plus.
- Eccellenti capacità comunicative in inglese, sia verbali che scritte. La conoscenza del tedesco, francese o italiano è un vantaggio.
- Capacità comprovata di redigere report e comunicare efficacemente con un pubblico senior.
- Motivazione autonoma, diligenza, elevata organizzazione, capacità di priorizzare e gestire più attività, e capacità di prosperare in un ambiente dinamico.
- Eccellenti capacità analitiche e di problem solving, capacità di lavorare in modo autonomo e come parte di un team globale.
- Mentalità innovativa, con capacità di individuare opportunità di miglioramento dei processi e di efficienza operativa. Our Values Accountability : Assumersi la responsabilità di compiti e sfide, e cercare il miglioramento continuo Hands-on : Essere proattivi per consegnare rapidamente risultati di alta qualità Passionate : Essere impegnati e puntare all’eccellenza Solution-driven : Focalizzarsi sui risultati del cliente e trattare i clienti in modo equo con una mentalità consapevole del rischio Partnership-oriented : Promuovere collaborazione e lavoro di squadra. Lavorare insieme con uno spirito imprenditoriale.
descriptionByLocale.de:
Stellenbeschreibung Die Position des Operational Risk Analyst befindet sich innerhalb der Funktion des operationellen Risikos und konzentriert sich auf die Stärkung des Risikomanagement- und internen Kontrollrahmens der Bank weltweit. Als wichtiger Risikopartner für die erste Verteidigungslinie bietet die Position unabhängige Herausforderungen und Überwachung der operationellen Risiken, um sicherzustellen, dass Prozesse, Systeme und Aktivitäten im Einklang mit der Risikobereitschaft der Bank verwaltet werden. Hauptverantwortlichkeiten
- Überwachung der effektiven und konsistenten Umsetzung sowie Wartung des Risiko- und Kontrollmanagement-Frameworks weltweit;
- Beitrag zu thematischen Risiko- und Kontrollbewertungen zu einer Vielzahl von Themen, einschließlich Back- und Middle-Office, Fonds, Wertpapiere, Zahlungen, Corporate Actions und Order-Ausführung in Zusammenarbeit mit anderen Stakeholdern;
- Durchführung von Prozessdurchläufen und Kontrolltests zur Identifikation und Bewertung von Risiken und Kontrollen.
- Proaktive Eskalation und effektive Kommunikation wesentlicher Kontrollschwächen, enge Zusammenarbeit mit Schlüsselakteuren in den relevanten Funktionen zur Definition geeigneter Maßnahmenpläne und Überwachung ihrer rechtzeitigen Umsetzung.
- Fachliche Expertise bereitstellen und Empfehlungen für Verbesserungen geben, um die Einhaltung interner Vorschriften, regulatorischer Anforderungen und Branchenbest Practices sicherzustellen. Fähigkeiten und Erfahrung
- Master-Abschluss in Betriebswirtschaft, Wirtschaft oder einem technischen Fachgebiet (Wissenschaft, Technologie, Ingenieurwesen, Mathematik).
- Mindestens 5 bis 7 Jahre Erfahrung im Bankensektor (idealerweise im Risikokontroll-, Audit- oder Business-Risk-Management), oder in Beratung/Audit bei einer führenden professionellen Dienstleistungsfirma; eine Kombination aus beidem gilt als Vorteil.
- Fundiertes Verständnis von Bankprozessen und -systemen, Produkten und den damit verbundenen regulatorischen Anforderungen. Erfahrung mit Kernbankensystemen und Front-Systemen ist ein Plus.
- Hervorragende Kommunikationsfähigkeiten in Englisch, sowohl mündlich als auch schriftlich. Kenntnisse in Deutsch, Französisch oder Italienisch sind von Vorteil.
- Nachweisliche Fähigkeit, Berichte zu verfassen und effektiv mit einer Führungsebene zu kommunizieren.
- Selbstmotivation, Sorgfalt, hohe Organisation, Priorisierung und Multitasking-Fähigkeiten sowie die Fähigkeit, in einem schnelllebigen Umfeld zu gedeihen.
- Ausgezeichnete analytische Fähigkeiten und Problemlösungskompetenz, Fähigkeit, eigenständig und im globalen Team zu arbeiten.
- Innovatives Denken, mit der Fähigkeit, Chancen zur Prozessverbesserung und operativen Effizienz zu erkennen. Unsere Werte Verantwortung : Übernahme von Verantwortung für Aufgaben und Herausforderungen sowie kontinuierliche Verbesserung anstreben Praktisch : Proaktiv sein, um schnell hochwertige Ergebnisse zu liefern Leidenschaftlich : Engagiert sein und nach Exzellenz streben Lösungsorientiert : Fokus auf Kundenergebnisse und faire Behandlung der Kunden mit einer risiko-bewussten Denkweise Partnerschaftlich : Zusammenarbeit und Teamarbeit fördern. Gemeinsam mit unternehmerischem Geist arbeiten.
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Description du Poste Le poste d’Analyste Risque Opérationnel se situe au sein de la fonction Risque Opérationnel et vise à renforcer le cadre de gestion des risques et de contrôle interne de la banque à l’échelle mondiale. Agissant en tant que partenaire clé du premier niveau de défense, le poste fournit un défi et une supervision indépendants sur les risques opérationnels, en veillant à ce que les processus, systèmes et activités soient gérés conformément à l’appétit pour le risque de la banque. Principales responsabilités
- Superviser la mise en œuvre efficace et cohérente ainsi que la maintenance du cadre de gestion des risques et de contrôle à l’échelle mondiale ;
- Contribuer aux évaluations thématiques des risques et contrôles sur un large éventail de sujets, y compris le back-office, le middle-office, les fonds, les titres, les paiements, les actions corporatives et l’exécution des ordres, en collaboration avec d’autres parties prenantes ;
- Réaliser des walkthroughs de processus et des tests de contrôle pour permettre l’identification et l’évaluation des risques et contrôles.
- Escalader de manière proactive et communiquer efficacement les faiblesses de contrôle importantes, collaborer étroitement avec les principales parties prenantes dans les fonctions concernées pour définir des plans d’action appropriés, et superviser leur mise en œuvre en temps voulu.
- Fournir une expertise et faire des recommandations pour des améliorations afin d’assurer le respect des réglementations internes, des exigences réglementaires et des meilleures pratiques du secteur. Compétences et expérience
- Diplôme de Master en Administration des Affaires, Économie ou dans un domaine technique (Sciences, Technologie, Ingénierie, Mathématiques).
- Au moins 5 à 7 ans d’expérience dans le secteur bancaire (idéalement en Contrôle des Risques, Audit ou Gestion des Risques d’Entreprise), ou en conseil/audit auprès d’un cabinet de services professionnels de premier plan ; une combinaison des deux est un avantage.
- Bonne compréhension des processus et systèmes bancaires, des produits et des exigences réglementaires associées. Une expertise avec les systèmes bancaires de base et les systèmes front est un plus.
- Excellentes compétences en communication en anglais, à l’oral comme à l’écrit. La connaissance de l’allemand, du français ou de l’italien est un atout.
- Capacité avérée à rédiger des rapports et à communiquer efficacement avec un public de haut niveau.
- Autonomie, diligence, organisation rigoureuse, capacité à prioriser et à gérer plusieurs tâches, et à prospérer dans un environnement dynamique.
- Excellentes compétences analytiques et de résolution de problèmes, capacité à travailler de manière autonome et en équipe mondiale.
- Esprit innovant, avec la capacité d’identifier des opportunités d’amélioration des processus et d’efficacité opérationnelle. Nos Valeurs Responsabilité : Prendre en charge les tâches et défis, tout en recherchant une amélioration continue Pratique : Être proactif pour livrer rapidement des résultats de haute qualité Passionné : Être engagé et viser l’excellence Orienté solution : Se concentrer sur les résultats pour le client et traiter les clients équitablement avec une mentalité consciente du risque Partenariat : Favoriser la collaboration et le travail d’équipe. Travailler ensemble avec un esprit entrepreneurial.

summary: The position of Operational Risk Analyst sits within the Operational Risk function and focuses on strengthening the bank’s risk management and internal control framework globally. Acting as a key risk partner to the first line of defence, the position provides independent challenge and oversight on operational risks, ensuring that processes, systems and activities are managed in line with the bank’s risk appetite.
Location: Lugano, Zurich, Geneva.
Main responsibilities
responsibilities: Oversee the effective and consistent implementation and maintenance of the risk and control management framework globally.

Contribute to thematic risk and control assessments on a broad range of issues, including back and middle-office, funds, securities, payments, corporate actions, and order execution through collaboration with other stakeholders.
Perform process-level walkthroughs and control testing to enable the identification and assessment of risks and controls.

Proactively escalate and effectively communicate material control weaknesses, closely collaborate with key stakeholders in the relevant functions to define appropriate action plans and oversee their timely implementation.
Provide expertise and make recommendations for improvements to steer adherence to internal regulations, regulatory requirements and industry best practices.
Master’s degree in Business Administration, Economics, or a technical field (Science, Technology, Engineering, Mathematics).

At least 5 to 7 years of experience in the banking sector (ideally in Risk Control, Audit, or Business Risk Management), or in consulting/audit with a leading professional services firm; a combination of both is considered an advantage.
Strong understanding of banking processes and systems, products, and related regulatory requirements. Expertise with core banking systems and Front systems is a plus.
Excellent communication skills in English, both verbal and written. Knowledge of German, French, or Italian is a plus.
Proven ability to write reports and communicate effectively with a senior audience.
Self-motivated, diligent, highly organized, able to prioritize and multi-task, and thrive in a fast-paced environment.
Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills, able to work autonomously and as part of a global team.
Innovative mindset, with the ability to identify opportunities for process improvement and operational efficiency.

Perform process-level walkthroughs and control testing to enable the identification and assessment of risks and controls.

jobs.title: Apprendistato Impiegato/a di commercio AFC Banca
jobs.description:
Stai finendo la scuole media e sei interessato a diventare un professionista in banca?

Se questo è il tuo desiderio l'Apprendistato di Commercio AFC ramo Banca di EFG Bank è quello che fa per te.

Lavorerai in delle sedi principali svizzere di EFG Bank in centro a Lugano da agosto 2026 fino a agosto 2029 quando avrai ottenuto l'Attestato Federale di Capacità.

Durante i tre anni farai esperienze in team di lavoro diversi che operano a livello nazionale e internazionale e si occupano ad esempio di Private Banking, Compliance, Credit Cards, Central Filing, Credit, Business Risk Management, Asset Management, etc.

Oltre alla formazione in azienda, in cui sarai seguito da un tutor a te dedicato in ogni team, frequenterai la scuola professionale commerciale (CPC) di tuo interesse e i corsi presso il centro competenze bancarie (CYP) assieme a tutti gli apprendisti di commercio ramo banca del Cantone.

EFG Bank supporta e incoraggia lo svolgimento della maturità professionale integrata per garantire una formazione il più possible completa al termine dell'apprendistato.

Durante il percorso potrai sviluppare diverse competenze professionali, tra le quali:

- analisi del mercato finanziario e del credito

- conoscenza dei prodotti bancari

- elaborazione e verifica di documenti

- pianificazione delle scadenze e gestione delle priorità

- utilizzo dei sistemi informatici finanziari

## Requisiti

- Passione per l’economia e il mondo bancario

- Licenza di scuola media con ottimi risultati

- Spiccate capacità relazionali e facilità ad adattarsi a diversi scenari lavorativi

- Buone conoscenze informatiche

- Conoscenza della lingua inglese

Se sei motivato, grazie per allegare alla candidatura online: una lettera di motivazione, il CV, le tre più recenti pagelle scolastiche e la licenza di scuola media.

titleByLocale.en: Banking Commercial Apprenticeship (AFC) EFG International AG
titleByLocale.it: Apprendistato Impiegato/a di commercio AFC Banca
titleByLocale.fr: Apprentissage Employé/e de commerce CFC EFG International AG

descriptionByLocale.en: Are you finishing middle school and interested in becoming a professional in the bank? If this is your wish the AFC Trade Apprentice Bank of EFG Bank is what it does for you. You will be working at the main Swiss offices of EFG Bank in central Lugano from August 2026 until August 2029 when you get the Federal Certificate of Capacity. During the three years you will experience different working teams working at national and international level, for example Private Banking, Compliance, Credit Cards, Central Filing, Credit, Business Risk Management, Asset Management, etc. In addition to the training in the company, in which you will be followed by a tutor dedicated to you in each team, you will attend the commercial professional school (CPC) of your interest and courses at the banking center (CYPprendi) together EFG Bank supports and encourages the development of integrated vocational training to ensure training as complete as possible at the end of the apprenticeship. During the course you can develop different professional skills, including: - analysis of the financial market and credit - knowledge of banking products - processing and verification of documents - schedule of deadlines and management of priorities - use of financial IT systems ## Requirements - Passion for the economy and the banking world - Media school license with excellent results - Explained relational skills and ease to adapt to different business scenarios - Good computer motivation knowledge.
descriptionByLocale.it: Stai finendo la scuole media e sei interessato a diventare un professionista in banca? Se questo è il tuo desiderio l'Apprendistato di Commercio AFC ramo Banca di EFG Bank è quello che fa per te. Lavorerai in delle sedi principali svizzere di EFG Bank in centro a Lugano da agosto 2026 fino a agosto 2029 quando avrai ottenuto l'Attestato Federale di Capacità. Durante i tre anni farai esperienze in team di lavoro diversi che operano a livello nazionale e internazionale e si occupano ad esempio di Private Banking, Compliance, Credit Cards, Central Filing, Credit, Business Risk Management, Asset Management, etc. Oltre alla formazione in azienda, in cui sarai seguito da un tutor a te dedicato in ogni team, frequenterai la scuola professionale commerciale (CPC) di tuo interesse e i corsi presso il centro competenze bancarie (CYP) assieme a tutti gli apprendisti di commercio ramo banca del Cantone. EFG Bank supporta e incoraggia lo svolgimento della maturità professionale integrata per garantire una formazione il più possible completa al termine dell'apprendistato. Durante il percorso potrai sviluppare diverse competenze professionali, tra le quali: - analisi del mercato finanziario e del credito - conoscenza dei prodotti bancari - elaborazione e verifica di documenti - pianificazione delle scadenze e gestione delle priorità - utilizzo dei sistemi informatici finanziari ## Requisiti - Passione per l’economia e il mondo bancario - Licenza di scuola media con ottimi risultati - Spiccate capacità relazionali e facilità ad adattarsi a diversi scenari lavorativi - Buone conoscenze informatiche - Conoscenza della lingua inglese Se sei motivato, grazie per allegare alla candidatura online: una lettera di motivazione, il CV, le tre più recenti pagelle scolastiche e la licenza di scuola media.
descriptionByLocale.de: Sind Sie mit der Mittelschule fertig und daran interessiert, Profi in der Bank zu werden? Wenn dies Ihr Wunsch ist, ist die AFC Trade Apprentice Bank of EFG Bank das, was sie für Sie tut. Sie werden von August 2026 bis August 2029 an den Hauptbüros der EFG Bank im Zentrum von Lugano arbeiten, wenn Sie das Bundeszertifikat für Kapazität erhalten. Während der drei Jahre werden Sie verschiedene Arbeitsgruppen auf nationaler und internationaler Ebene erleben, zum Beispiel Private Banking, Compliance, Credit Cards, Central Filing, Credit, Business Risk Management, Asset Management, etc. Neben der Ausbildung in der Firma, in der Sie von einem Tutor, der Ihnen in jedem Team gewidmet wird, werden Sie an der kaufmännischen Schule (CPC) Ihres Interesses und Kurses im Bankenzentrum (CYPprendi) gemeinsam EFG Bank unterstützt und fördert die Entwicklung der integrierten Berufsbildung, um eine möglichst vollständige Ausbildung am Ende der Ausbildung zu gewährleisten. Im Laufe des Kurses können Sie verschiedene berufliche Fähigkeiten entwickeln, einschließlich: - Analyse des Finanzmarktes und Kredit - Wissen über Bankprodukte - Verarbeitung und Verifizierung von Dokumenten - Zeitplan der Fristen und Verwaltung von Prioritäten - Nutzung von Finanz-IT-Systemen Anforderungen - Leidenschaft für die Wirtschaft und die Bankenwelt - Medienschule Lizenz mit ausgezeichneten Ergebnissen - Erklärte relationale Fähigkeiten und Leichtigkeit, um sich an verschiedene Geschäftsszenarien anzupassen - Gute Computermotivationskenntnisse.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Est-ce que vous terminez le collège et que vous voulez devenir un professionnel à la banque? Si c'est votre souhait, l'AFC Trade Apprentice Bank of EFG Bank est ce qu'elle fait pour vous. Vous travaillerez dans les principaux bureaux suisses de la Banque EFG au centre de Lugano à partir d'août 2026 jusqu'à août 2029 lorsque vous obtiendrez le certificat fédéral de capacité. Au cours des trois années, vous vivrez différentes équipes de travail travaillant aux niveaux national et international, par exemple banque privée, conformité, cartes de crédit, dépôt central, crédit, gestion des risques d'entreprise, gestion d'actifs, etc. En plus de la formation dans l'entreprise, dans laquelle vous serez suivi par un tuteur dédié à vous dans chaque équipe, vous assisterez à l'école professionnelle commerciale (CPC) de votre intérêt et des cours au centre bancaire (CYPprendi) ensemble EFG Bank soutient et encourage le développement de la formation professionnelle intégrée pour assurer la formation la plus complète possible à la fin de l'apprentissage. Pendant le cours, vous pouvez développer différentes compétences professionnelles, y compris: - analyse du marché financier et du crédit - connaissance des produits bancaires - traitement et vérification des documents - calendrier des échéances et gestion des priorités - utilisation des systèmes financiers informatiques ## Exigences - Passion pour l'économie et le monde bancaire - Licence de l'école des médias avec d'excellents résultats - Expliquer les compétences relationnelles et la facilité à s'adapter à différents scénarios d'affaires - Bonne connaissance de la motivation informatique.

jobs.title: EFG Graduate Programme 2026 - Digital and IT - Cyber Security and Cloud Architecture
jobs.description:
We are looking for young talent to join our EFG Graduate Programme – Digital and IT path in Geneva , with a focus on Cyber Security and Cloud Architecture

How the EFG Graduate Programme works?

Starting in September 2026 and over a period of 18 months, the EFG Graduate Programme offers a challenging and exciting opportunity for recent graduates. Tailored on individual skills, interests, and competencies, the programme provides an ideal opportunity to obtain wide-ranging experience in an international and fast-growing private banking group:

- You will start with a 2-week onboarding in Switzerland to discover EFG Mission, Vision and Culture and start building your professional network.

- During the onboarding you will have the chance to attend specific trainings aimed at enhancing key competencies and communication skills.

- Continuous learning opportunities to ensure you develop both personally and professionally to achieve full potential.

- Buddy and Mentor to accompany you throughout the programme.

- Truly global, we have positions based in Miami, London, Luxembourg, Geneva, Zurich, Lugano, Singapore and Hong Kong.

In this path, you will complete a 6-month rotation in your preferred digital or IT function, allowing you to specialise and develop expertise in your chosen area. You will also undertake two additional 6-month rotations across different teams, broadening your understanding of how digital solutions and IT infrastructure drive the private banking industry.

This path provides a strong foundation for a career in digital, innovative, and forward-looking roles, equipping you with the skills and insights needed to excel in EFG’s dynamic business environment.

Could you be one of our future graduates?

We value diversity and we do not require specific academic majors or industry experience, but look for different mix of background, experiences and skills.

## Our graduates are brilliant and enthusiastic talents, so we expect

- Bachelor or Master degree (completed in 2025 or on track to complete it) with outstanding academic results in a field with affinity with the selected professional path.

- Excellent English (any other language will be an advantage)

- International mindset

- Strong analytical, problem solving and organisational skills

- Forward thinking and able to suggest new ways of working to improve efficiency and competitiveness

- Self-disciplined, committed and with strong work ethics

- Adaptable and able to work collaboratively in a team environment with people from different backgrounds

- Client-oriented

- Proactive self-starter with intellectual curiosity

What will you get?

- Dynamic work experience by rotating through different teams and business units

- Experience an enriching international network

- Opportunity to build expertise in your chosen field and contribute to the EFG Culture

- Continuous development and learning opportunities on both technical and soft skills
