descriptionByLocale.it:
La nostra azienda EFG International è un gruppo bancario privato globale che offre servizi di private banking e gestione patrimoniale. Serviamo clienti in oltre 40 sedi in tutto il mondo. EFG International offre un ambiente di lavoro stimolante e dinamico e si impegna a essere un datore di lavoro di scelta. La nostra missione e scopo Empowering entrepreneurial minds to create value – today and for the future. Descrizione del lavoro Il Sviluppatore EPM OneStream/Analista Dati Business sarà parte del team di Misurazione delle Prestazioni, Budgeting e Reporting del Gruppo a Lugano e contribuirà a sviluppare e gestire un processo integrato di pianificazione, reporting e revisione delle prestazioni per facilitare decisioni aziendali guidate dal valore. Nel suo ruolo di Sviluppatore EPM OneStream, la risorsa sarà responsabile della gestione, manutenzione e sviluppo della nostra piattaforma di pianificazione OneStream esistente. Nel suo ruolo di Sviluppatore EPM OneStream/Analista Dati Business, la risorsa sosterrà le attività di misurazione delle prestazioni eseguendo analisi granulari delle cause profonde della performance finanziaria e fornendo informazioni approfondite sugli elementi che creano valore. La risorsa giocherà un ruolo attivo nel sostenere lo sviluppo aziendale e fornire supporto decisionale di valore aggiunto utilizzando la modellazione dei dati e l'intelligenza previsionale. Responsabilità principali
- Sviluppatore EPM OneStream
- Analista aziendale e utente avanzato dei dati MI
- Progettare e mantenere modelli di dati per l'analisi e la previsione
- Creare e compilare dashboard e presentazioni per la gestione senior
- Partecipare attivamente ai dialoghi sulla performance aziendale
- Collaborazione attiva con l'unità di Strategia e Sviluppo Aziendale durante il processo di budgeting e previsione
- Progettare e sviluppare report MI e simulazioni con dati provenienti dai vari sistemi MIS della banca per fornire informazioni approfondite sugli elementi che creano valore per l'azienda
- Sviluppare una forte relazione con la gestione aziendale e i responsabili della pianificazione e del controllo per sostenere la partnership aziendale Pianificazione e Controllo Abilità ed esperienza
- Esperienza professionale nell'ambito dell'intelligenza aziendale EPM nel settore finanziario
- Software OneStream: esperto in manutenzione e sviluppo di applicazioni EPM
- Capacità di comprendere grandi dataset ed esperienza nella modellazione dei dati, fornendo analisi accurate dei dati
- Utente avanzato di OneStream, MS-PowerBI, MS-Excel e PowerPoint; Conoscenza di Excel Macros, VBA, Python, SAS Enterprise Guide per automatizzare l'estrazione e la segnalazione dei dati
- Velocità di apprendimento, accuratezza ed efficienza
- Atteggiamento proattivo e disponibilità a imparare nuove conoscenze e competenze
- Capacità di lavorare sotto pressione e adattarsi a richieste di lavoro impreviste
- Buone capacità di comunicazione per comunicare efficacemente con le parti interessate a tutti i livelli
- Fluente in italiano e inglese I nostri valori
- Accountability: Assunzione della proprietà di compiti e sfide, nonché ricerca del miglioramento continuo
- Hands-on: Essere proattivi per fornire risultati di alta qualità rapidamente
- Passionate: Essere impegnati e impegnarsi per l'eccellenza
- Solution-driven: Focalizzazione sui risultati dei clienti e trattamento dei clienti in modo equo con un atteggiamento consapevole del rischio
- Partnership-oriented: Promozione della collaborazione e del lavoro di squadra. Lavorare insieme con uno spirito imprenditoriale.
descriptionByLocale.de:
Unser Unternehmen EFG International ist eine globale Private-Banking-Gruppe, die private Banking- und Vermögensverwaltungsdienstleistungen anbietet. Wir bedienen Kunden an über 40 Standorten weltweit. EFG International bietet eine stimulierende und dynamische Arbeitsumgebung und bemüht sich, ein Arbeitgeber erster Wahl zu sein. Unser Zweck und unsere Mission Empowering entrepreneurial minds to create value – today and for the future. Job-Beschreibung Der EPM OneStream-Entwickler/Business Data Analyst wird Teil des Teams Group Performance Measurement, Budgeting & Reporting in Lugano sein und dazu beitragen, einen integrierten Planungs-, Berichts- und Leistungsüberprüfungsprozess zu entwickeln und zu betreiben, um wertgetriebene Geschäftsentscheidungen zu erleichtern. In seiner Rolle als EPM OneStream-Entwickler wird die Ressource die laufende, Wartung und Entwicklung unserer bestehenden OneStream-Planungsplattform überwachen. In seiner Rolle als EPM OneStream-Entwickler/Business Data Analyst wird die Ressource die Leistungsmessungsaktivitäten unterstützen, indem sie granulare Analysen der finanziellen Leistungsursachen durchführt und Einblicke in die Wertschöpfungshebel liefert. Die Ressource wird eine aktive Rolle bei der Unterstützung der Geschäftsentwicklung und der Bereitstellung von wertaddierendem Entscheidungssupport unter Verwendung von Datenmodellierung und Prognoseintelligenz spielen. Hauptverantwortungen
- EPM OneStream-Entwickler
- Business-Analyst und Power-User von MI-Daten
- Entwerfen und Warten von Datenmodellen für Analyse und Prognose
- Erstellen und Zusammenstellen von Dashboards und Präsentationen für das Senior-Management
- Aktive Teilnahme an den Business-Performance-Dialogen
- Aktive Zusammenarbeit mit der Strategie- und Unternehmensentwicklungseinheit während des Budgetierungs- und Prognoseprozesses
- Entwerfen und Entwickeln von MI-Berichten und -Simulationen mit Daten aus den verschiedenen MIS-Systemen der Bank, um Einblicke in die Wertschöpfungshebel für das Geschäft zu liefern
- Aufbau einer starken Beziehung zu den Geschäftsführern und den Planungs- und Controlling-Verantwortlichen, um die Geschäftsbeziehung zwischen Planung und Controlling zu unterstützen Fähigkeiten und Erfahrungen
- Berufserfahrung im Bereich EPM Business Intelligence in der Finanzindustrie
- OneStream-Software: Experte für Wartung und Entwicklung von EPM-Anwendungen
- Fähigkeit, große Datenmengen zu verstehen und Erfahrung in der Datenmodellierung, um genaue Datenanalysen bereitzustellen
- Power-User von OneStream, MS-PowerBI, MS-Excel und PowerPoint; Kenntnisse von Excel-Makros, VBA, Python, SAS Enterprise Guide zur Automatisierung der Datenextraktion und -berichterstattung
- Schnelle Lerner, Genauigkeit und Effizienz
- Proaktive Einstellung und Bereitschaft, neue Kenntnisse und Fähigkeiten zu erwerben
- Fähigkeit, unter Druck zu arbeiten und sich an unvorhergesehene Arbeitsanforderungen anzupassen
- Gute Kommunikationsfähigkeiten, um effektiv mit Stakeholdern auf allen Ebenen zu kommunizieren
- Fließend in Italienisch und Englisch Unsere Werte
- Accountability: Übernahme von Verantwortung für Aufgaben und Herausforderungen sowie kontinuierliche Verbesserung
- Hands-on: Proaktiv sein, um Ergebnisse von hoher Qualität schnell zu liefern
- Passionate: Engagement und Streben nach Exzellenz
- Solution-driven: Fokus auf Kundenergebnisse und faire Behandlung von Kunden mit einem risikobewussten Mindset
- Partnership-oriented: Förderung von Zusammenarbeit und Teamarbeit. Zusammenarbeiten mit einem unternehmerischen Geist.
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Notre entreprise EFG International est un groupe bancaire privé mondial offrant des services de private banking et de gestion de patrimoine. Nous servons des clients dans plus de 40 sites à travers le monde. EFG International offre un environnement de travail stimulant et dynamique et s'efforce d'être un employeur de choix. Notre objectif et notre mission Empowering entrepreneurial minds to create value – today and for the future. Description du poste Le développeur EPM OneStream/analyste de données métier fera partie de l'équipe de mesure de la performance, de la budgétisation et du reporting du groupe à Lugano et contribuera à développer et à gérer un processus intégré de planification, de reporting et d'examen de la performance pour faciliter les décisions commerciales axées sur la valeur. Dans son rôle de développeur EPM OneStream, la ressource sera responsable de la gestion, de la maintenance et du développement de notre plate-forme de planification OneStream existante. Dans son rôle de développeur EPM OneStream/analyste de données métier, la ressource soutiendra les activités de mesure de la performance en effectuant des analyses granulaires des causes profondes de la performance financière et en fournissant des informations sur les leviers de création de valeur. La ressource jouera un rôle actif dans le soutien au développement commercial et la fourniture d'un soutien décisionnel à valeur ajoutée en utilisant la modélisation des données et l'intelligence prévisionnelle. Responsabilités principales
- Développeur EPM OneStream
- Analyste commercial et utilisateur expérimenté de données MI
- Concevoir et maintenir des modèles de données pour l'analyse et la prévision
- Établir et compiler des tableaux de bord et des présentations pour la direction supérieure
- Participer activement aux dialogues sur la performance commerciale
- Collaboration active avec l'unité de stratégie et de développement commercial pendant le processus de budgétisation et de prévision
- Concevoir et développer des rapports MI et des simulations avec des données provenant des différents systèmes MIS de la banque pour fournir des informations sur les leviers de création de valeur pour l'entreprise
- Développer une relation solide avec la direction commerciale et les responsables de la planification et du contrôle pour soutenir le partenariat commercial Planification et Contrôle Compétences et expérience
- Expérience professionnelle dans le domaine de l'intelligence commerciale EPM dans l'industrie financière
- Logiciel OneStream: expert en maintenance et développement d'applications EPM
- Capacité à comprendre de grands ensembles de données et expérience de la modélisation des données, fournissant des analyses précises des données
- Utilisateur expérimenté de OneStream, MS-PowerBI, MS-Excel et PowerPoint; Connaissance des macros Excel, VBA, Python, SAS Enterprise Guide pour automatiser l'extraction et la déclaration de données
- Apprentissage rapide, précision et efficacité
- Attitude proactive et volonté d'acquérir de nouvelles connaissances et compétences
- Capacité à travailler sous pression et à s'adapter à des demandes de travail imprévues
- Bonnes compétences en communication pour communiquer efficacement avec les parties prenantes à tous les niveaux
- Courant en italien et en anglais Nos valeurs
- Accountability: Prendre en charge les tâches et les défis, ainsi que la recherche d'amélioration continue
- Hands-on: Être proactif pour fournir des résultats de haute qualité rapidement
- Passionate: Être engagé et s'efforcer d'excellence
- Solution-driven: Se concentrer sur les résultats des clients et traiter les clients de manière équitable avec un état d'esprit conscient des risques
- Partnership-oriented: Promouvoir la collaboration et le travail d'équipe. Travailler ensemble avec un esprit entrepreneurial.

jobs.title: Network & Proxy Support Team Lead
jobs.description:
General Information

- Department: Information Technology – Infrastructure

- Work Time Percentage: 100%

- Location: Geneva

Our Company

EFG International is a global private banking group, offering private banking and asset management services. We serve clients in over 40 locations worldwide. EFG International offers a stimulating and dynamic work environment and strives to be an employer of choice.

Our Purpose and Mission

Empowering entrepreneurial minds to create value – today and for the future.

Job Description

Role and Team

Within the Information Technology Department, you will join a team of 12 engineers based in Geneva and collaborate with IT colleagues in more than 30 countries. Under the supervision of the IT Infrastructure Support Manager, you will lead a team of three network engineers.

You will combine people management with hands-on engineering, ensuring that EFG’s business-critical systems remain secure, resilient, and always connected in a demanding private banking environment.

Main Responsibilities

1. Leadership & Management

- Lead, coach and develop a team of three network engineers, fostering a culture of accountability, collaboration and continuous improvement.

- Combine team leadership with hands-on technical work on complex incidents and projects.

- Oversee day-to-day network and proxy operations, including incident, problem and change management.

- Plan and coordinate network and proxy upgrades, migrations and lifecycle activities in alignment with business and security requirements.

- Manage escalations, ensuring timely resolution of major incidents and clear communication with stakeholders.

- Manage and review third-party providers and vendor contracts, ensuring service quality, cost effectiveness and adherence to SLAs.

- Ensure compliance with internal policies as well as regulatory, security and audit requirements relevant to network and security infrastructure.

2. Proxy / Secure Web Gateway (Zscaler)

- Collaborate closely with security teams to define, implement and maintain security policies, including URL filtering, cloud application and file filtering, DLP and access control.

- Configure, operate and maintain Zscaler solutions (ZIA, ZPA) and related components such as SIPA, cloud firewall, PAC files, NSS, ZCC...

- Manage corporate devices using Zscaler Client Connector (ZCC), ensuring secure and reliable connectivity.

- Troubleshoot and resolve Zscaler-related issues by analysing logs, performing traces and applying appropriate corrective actions.

- Analyse network packet traces (PCAP), Fiddler logs and HTTP/HTTPS headers to identify and resolve complex connectivity and performance issues.

- Proactively suggest and implement improvements to network and proxy performance, capacity, scalability and security posture.

3. Network Engineering & Operations

- Provide 2nd and 3rd level technical support for network and related services.

- Configure, install and maintain network devices and services (e.g. routers, switches, firewalls, load balancers, VPN, QoS).

- Support and maintain network connectivity for financial market data feeds and other latency-sensitive services.

- Implement and maintain a continuous improvement process by defining, documenting and enforcing network and proxy standards, procedures and best practices.

- Interface with external suppliers and partners (integrators, telecom providers, market data vendors, etc.) to design, implement and support network solutions.

- Participate in 24x7 on-call / on-duty rotation (piquet) to support critical infrastructure.

- Monitor network and proxy performance, ensuring system availability, reliability and security.

- Monitor system resource utilisation, trends and capacity, and plan upgrades or optimisations accordingly.

Skills and Experience

Background

- 6–10 years of experience in networking in complex, international environments.

- Strong knowledge of enterprise networking architecture and network security.

- Professional experience with Cisco technologies and Cisco ACI; financial services experience is a plus.

Technical Skills

- Expert in LAN/WAN/MAN implementation and troubleshooting.

- Strong experience with firewalls (Fortinet and/or Check Point), VPN, IPSec and GRE tunnels.

- Proven expertise with Zscaler ZIA/ZPA and ZCC on corporate devices.

- Solid understanding of network and cloud connectivity design.

- Ability to analyse network traces (PCAP), Fiddler logs and HTTP/HTTPS headers.

- Knowledge of Python or another scripting language for automation; Zscaler certification is a plus.

Soft Skills & Languages

- Strong communication skills; able to work effectively with technical and non-technical stakeholders.

- Experience managing third-party providers and internal support teams.

- Rigorous, autonomous, proactive and service-oriented, with strong documentation skills.

- Fluent in French and English, written and spoken.

Our Values

- Accountability: Taking ownership for tasks and challenges, as well as seeking continuous improvement.

- Hands-on: Being proactive to rapidly deliver high-quality results.

- Passionate: Being committed and striving for excellence.

- Solution-driven: Focusing on client outcomes and treating clients fairly with a risk-aware mindset.

- Partnership-oriented: Promoting collaboration and teamwork; working together with an entrepreneurial spirit.

Application

- Please ensure you attach a cover letter to your CV when submitting your application.

- Should you wish to apply for this position, please use the designated application link.

- Ability to analyse network traces (PCAP), Fiddler logs and HTTP/HTTPS headers.
- Knowledge of Python or another scripting language for automation; Zscaler certification is a plus.

Soft Skills & Languages
- Strong communication skills; able to work effectively with technical and non-technical stakeholders.
- Experience managing third-party providers and internal support teams.
- Rigorous, autonomous, proactive and service-oriented, with strong documentation skills.
- Fluent in French and English, written and spoken.

Our Values
- Accountability: Taking ownership for tasks and challenges, as well as seeking continuous improvement.
- Hands-on: Being proactive to rapidly deliver high-quality results.
- Passionate: Being committed and striving for excellence.
- Solution-driven: Focusing on client outcomes and treating clients fairly with a risk-aware mindset.
- Partnership-oriented: Promoting collaboration and teamwork; working together with an entrepreneurial spirit.

Application
- Please ensure you attach a cover letter to your CV when submitting your application.
- Should you wish to apply for this position, please use the designated application link.
descriptionByLocale.it:
Informazioni generali
- Dipartimento: Information Technology – Infrastructure
- Percentuale di tempo di lavoro: 100%
- Luogo: Ginevra La nostra azienda EFG International è un gruppo bancario privato globale che offre servizi di private banking e gestione patrimoniale. Serviamo clienti in oltre 40 sedi in tutto il mondo. EFG International offre un ambiente di lavoro stimolante e dinamico e si impegna a essere un datore di lavoro di scelta. La nostra missione e il nostro scopo Empowering entrepreneurial minds to create value – today and for the future. Descrizione del lavoro Ruolo e team Nel Dipartimento di Information Technology, ti unirai a un team di 12 ingegneri con sede a Ginevra e collaborerai con colleghi IT in più di 30 paesi. Sotto la supervisione del responsabile del supporto IT Infrastructure, guiderai un team di tre ingegneri di rete. Combinerai la gestione delle persone con il lavoro tecnico pratico, garantendo che i sistemi critici per l'azienda di EFG rimangano sicuri, resilienti e sempre connessi in un ambiente di private banking impegnativo. Responsabilità principali 1. Leadership e gestione
- Guidare, allenare e sviluppare un team di tre ingegneri di rete, favorendo una cultura della responsabilità, della collaborazione e del miglioramento continuo.
- Combinare la leadership del team con lavori tecnici pratici su incidenti e progetti complessi.
- Sovrintendere alle operazioni quotidiane di rete e proxy, inclusa la gestione degli incidenti, dei problemi e delle modifiche.
- Pianificare e coordinare gli aggiornamenti, le migrazioni e le attività del ciclo di vita della rete e del proxy in linea con i requisiti aziendali e di sicurezza.
- Gestire le escalation, garantendo la risoluzione tempestiva dei principali incidenti e una comunicazione chiara con le parti interessate.
- Gestire e esaminare i fornitori di terze parti e i contratti dei fornitori, garantendo la qualità del servizio, l'efficacia dei costi e l'aderenza agli SLA.
- Garantire la conformità con le politiche interne nonché con i requisiti normativi, di sicurezza e di audit relativi all'infrastruttura di rete e sicurezza. 2. Proxy / Secure Web Gateway (Zscaler)
- Collaborare a stretto contatto con i team di sicurezza per definire, implementare e mantenere politiche di sicurezza, inclusa la filtrazione degli URL, la filtrazione delle applicazioni cloud e dei file, DLP e controllo degli accessi.
- Configurare, gestire e mantenere soluzioni Zscaler (ZIA, ZPA) e componenti correlati come SIPA, firewall cloud, file PAC, NSS, ZCC...
- Gestire i dispositivi aziendali utilizzando Zscaler Client Connector (ZCC), garantendo una connettività sicura e affidabile.
- Risolvere e risolvere i problemi relativi a Zscaler analizzando i registri, eseguendo tracce e applicando azioni correttive appropriate.
- Analizzare le tracce dei pacchetti di rete (PCAP), i registri Fiddler e le intestazioni HTTP/HTTPS per identificare e risolvere problemi complessi di connettività e prestazioni.
- Suggerire e implementare proattivamente miglioramenti alle prestazioni, alla capacità, alla scalabilità e alla sicurezza della rete e del proxy. 3. Ingegneria e operazioni di rete
- Fornire supporto tecnico di secondo e terzo livello per servizi di rete e relativi.
- Configurare, installare e mantenere dispositivi e servizi di rete (ad esempio router, switch, firewall, bilanciatori di carico, VPN, QoS).
- Supportare e mantenere la connettività di rete per i feed dei dati del mercato finanziario e altri servizi sensibili alla latenza.
- Implementare e mantenere un processo di miglioramento continuo definendo, documentando e applicando standard, procedure e best practice di rete e proxy.
- Interfacciare con fornitori e partner esterni (integratori, fornitori di telecomunicazioni, fornitori di dati di mercato, ecc.) per progettare, implementare e supportare soluzioni di rete.
- Partecipare alla rotazione on-call / on-duty 24x7 (piquet) per supportare l'infrastruttura critica.
- Monitorare le prestazioni della rete e del proxy, garantendo la disponibilità, l'affidabilità e la sicurezza del sistema.
- Monitorare l'utilizzo delle risorse di sistema, le tendenze e la capacità e pianificare gli aggiornamenti o le ottimizzazioni di conseguenza. Abilità ed esperienza Background - 6–10 anni di esperienza nella rete in ambienti complessi e internazionali.
- Conoscenza approfondita dell'architettura di rete aziendale e della sicurezza di rete.
- Esperienza professionale con tecnologie Cisco e Cisco ACI; l'esperienza nei servizi finanziari è un vantaggio. Abilità tecniche
- Esperto nell'implementazione e nella risoluzione dei problemi di LAN/WAN/MAN.
- Esperienza approfondita con firewall (Fortinet e/o Check Point), VPN, IPSec e tunnel GRE.
- Competenza comprovata con Zscaler ZIA/ZPA e ZCC su dispositivi aziendali.
- Comprensione approfondita della progettazione della connettività di rete e cloud.
- Capacità di analizzare tracce di rete (PCAP), registri Fiddler e intestazioni HTTP/HTTPS.
- Conoscenza di Python o altro linguaggio di scripting per l'automazione; la certificazione Zscaler è un vantaggio. Abilità morbide e lingue
- Abilità di comunicazione avanzate; capacità di lavorare in modo efficace con stakeholder tecnici e non tecnici.
- Esperienza nella gestione di fornitori di terze parti e team di supporto interni.
- Rigoroso, autonomo, proattivo e orientato al servizio, con forti abilità di documentazione.
- Fluente in francese e inglese, scritto e parlato. I nostri valori
- Accountability: Taking ownership for tasks and challenges, as well as seeking continuous improvement.
- Hands-on: Being proactive to rapidly deliver high-quality results.
- Passionate: Being committed and striving for excellence.
- Solution-driven: Focusing on client outcomes and treating clients fairly with a risk-aware mindset.
- Partnership-oriented: Promoting collaboration and teamwork; working together with an entrepreneurial spirit. Candidatura
- Si prega di assicurarsi di allegare una lettera di presentazione al proprio CV quando si invia la candidatura.
- Se si desidera candidarsi per questa posizione, si prega di utilizzare il link di candidatura designato.
descriptionByLocale.de:
Allgemeine Informationen
- Abteilung: Information Technology – Infrastructure
- Arbeitszeitprozentsatz: 100%
- Standort: Genf Unser Unternehmen EFG International ist eine globale Private-Banking-Gruppe, die Private-Banking- und Vermögensverwaltungsdienstleistungen anbietet. Wir bedienen Kunden in über 40 Standorten weltweit. EFG International bietet eine stimulierende und dynamische Arbeitsumgebung und bemüht sich, ein Arbeitgeber erster Wahl zu sein. Unser Zweck und unsere Mission Empowering entrepreneurial minds to create value – today and for the future. Job-Beschreibung Rolle und Team Im Rahmen der Information Technology Department werden Sie sich einem Team von 12 Ingenieuren in Genf anschließen und mit IT-Kollegen in mehr als 30 Ländern zusammenarbeiten. Unter der Aufsicht des IT-Infrastruktur-Support-Managers werden Sie ein Team von drei Netzwerkingenieuren leiten. Sie werden die Personalführung mit praktischer technischer Arbeit kombinieren, um sicherzustellen, dass die geschäftskritischen Systeme von EFG sicher, widerstandsfähig und immer verbunden bleiben in einer anspruchsvollen Private-Banking-Umgebung. Hauptverantwortungen 1. Führung und Management
- Führen, coachen und entwickeln Sie ein Team von drei Netzwerkingenieuren, fördern Sie eine Kultur der Verantwortung, Zusammenarbeit und kontinuierlichen Verbesserung.
- Kombinieren Sie Teamführung mit praktischer technischer Arbeit an komplexen Vorfällen und Projekten.
- Überwachen Sie den täglichen Betrieb von Netzwerk und Proxy, einschließlich Vorfall-, Problem- und Änderungsmanagement.
- Planen und koordinieren Sie Netzwerk- und Proxy-Upgrades, Migrationen und Lebenszyklusaktivitäten im Einklang mit Geschäfts- und Sicherheitsanforderungen.
- Verwalten Sie Eskalationen, um eine zeitnahe Lösung von größeren Vorfällen und eine klare Kommunikation mit Stakeholdern sicherzustellen.
- Verwalten und überprüfen Sie externe Anbieter und Lieferantenverträge, um Servicequalität, Kosteneffizienz und Einhaltung von SLAs sicherzustellen.
- Stellen Sie die Einhaltung interner Richtlinien sowie regulatorischer, Sicherheits- und Audit-Anforderungen für Netzwerk- und Sicherheitsinfrastruktur sicher. 2. Proxy / Secure Web Gateway (Zscaler)
- Arbeiten Sie eng mit Sicherheitsteams zusammen, um Sicherheitsrichtlinien zu definieren, zu implementieren und aufrechtzuerhalten, einschließlich URL-Filterung, Cloud-Anwendungs- und Dateifilterung, DLP und Zugriffskontrolle.
- Konfigurieren, betreiben und warten Sie Zscaler-Lösungen (ZIA, ZPA) und zugehörige Komponenten wie SIPA, Cloud-Firewall, PAC-Dateien, NSS, ZCC...
- Verwalten Sie Unternehmensgeräte mit Zscaler Client Connector (ZCC), um eine sichere und zuverlässige Konnektivität sicherzustellen.
- Analysieren und lösen Sie Zscaler-bezogene Probleme durch Analyse von Protokollen, Durchführung von Tracen und Anwendung von Korrekturmaßnahmen.
- Analysieren Sie Netzwerkpakettspuren (PCAP), Fiddler-Protokolle und HTTP/HTTPS-Header, um komplexe Konnektivitäts- und Leistungsprobleme zu identifizieren und zu lösen.
- Schlagen Sie proaktiv Verbesserungen für Netzwerk- und Proxy-Leistung, Kapazität, Skalierbarkeit und Sicherheit vor und setzen Sie diese um. 3. Netzwerktechnik und -betrieb
- Bieten Sie technische Unterstützung der zweiten und dritten Ebene für Netzwerk- und zugehörige Dienste an.
- Konfigurieren, installieren und warten Sie Netzwerkgeräte und -dienste (z.B. Router, Switches, Firewalls, Load Balancer, VPN, QoS).
- Unterstützen und warten Sie die Netzwerkkonnektivität für Finanzmarktdaten-Feeds und andere latenzsensitive Dienste.
- Implementieren und aufrechterhalten Sie einen kontinuierlichen Verbesserungsprozess durch Definition, Dokumentation und Durchsetzung von Netzwerk- und Proxy-Standards, -verfahren und -best Practices.
- Arbeiten Sie mit externen Lieferanten und Partnern (Integratoren, Telekommunikationsanbieter, Marktdata-Anbieter usw.) zusammen, um Netzwerk-Lösungen zu entwerfen, zu implementieren und zu unterstützen.
- Nehmen Sie an der 24x7-On-Call-/On-Duty-Rotation (Piquet) teil, um kritische Infrastruktur zu unterstützen.
- Überwachen Sie Netzwerk- und Proxy-Leistung, um Systemverfügbarkeit, -zuverlässigkeit und -sicherheit sicherzustellen.
- Überwachen Sie Systemressourcennutzung, Trends und Kapazität und planen Sie Upgrades oder Optimierungen entsprechend. Fähigkeiten und Erfahrung Hintergrund - 6–10 Jahre Erfahrung in der Netzwerkadministration in komplexen, internationalen Umgebungen.
- Tiefere Kenntnisse der Unternehmensnetzwerkarchitektur und Netzwerksicherheit.
- Berufserfahrung mit Cisco-Technologien und Cisco ACI; Erfahrung im Finanzsektor ist von Vorteil. Technische Fähigkeiten
- Experte in LAN/WAN/MAN-Implementierung und -Fehlerbehebung.
- Tiefere Erfahrung mit Firewalls (Fortinet und/oder Check Point), VPN, IPSec und GRE-Tunneln.
- Nachweisbare Expertise mit Zscaler ZIA/ZPA und ZCC auf Unternehmensgeräten.
- Solides Verständnis von Netzwerk- und Cloud-Konnektivitätsdesign.
- Fähigkeit, Netzwerkpakettspuren (PCAP), Fiddler-Protokolle und HTTP/HTTPS-Header zu analysieren.
- Kenntnisse von Python oder einer anderen Skriptsprache für Automatisierung; Zscaler-Zertifizierung ist von Vorteil. Weiche Fähigkeiten und Sprachen
- Starke Kommunikationsfähigkeiten; in der Lage, effektiv mit technischen und nicht-technischen Stakeholdern zusammenzuarbeiten.
- Erfahrung in der Verwaltung von externen Anbietern und internen Support-Teams.
- Sorgfältig, autonom, proaktiv und serviceorientiert, mit starken Dokumentationsfähigkeiten.
- Fließend in Französisch und Englisch, schriftlich und mündlich. Unsere Werte
- Verantwortung: Übernahme von Verantwortung für Aufgaben und Herausforderungen sowie kontinuierliche Verbesserung.
- Hands-on: Proaktiv, um schnellstmöglich qualitative Ergebnisse zu liefern.
- Leidenschaftlich: Engagement und Streben nach Exzellenz.
- Lösungsorientiert: Konzentration auf Kundenergebnisse und faire Behandlung von Kunden mit einem risikobewussten Mindset.
- Partnerschaftlich: Förderung von Zusammenarbeit und Teamarbeit; Zusammenarbeit mit einem unternehmerischen Geist. Bewerbung
- Bitte fügen Sie einen Lebenslauf und ein kurzes Anschreiben bei Ihrer Bewerbung bei.
- Wenn Sie sich für diese Position bewerben möchten, verwenden Sie bitte den vorgesehenen Bewerbungslink.
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Informations générales
- Département: Information Technology – Infrastructure
- Pourcentage de temps de travail: 100%
- Lieu: Genève Notre entreprise EFG International est un groupe bancaire privé mondial offrant des services de private banking et de gestion de patrimoine. Nous servons des clients dans plus de 40 sites à travers le monde. EFG International offre un environnement de travail stimulant et dynamique et s'efforce d'être un employeur de choix. Notre mission et notre objectif Empowering entrepreneurial minds to create value – today and for the future. Description du poste Rôle et équipe Au sein du département Information Technology, vous rejoindrez une équipe de 12 ingénieurs basée à Genève et collaborerez avec des collègues IT dans plus de 30 pays. Sous la supervision du responsable du support IT Infrastructure, vous dirigerez une équipe de trois ingénieurs réseau. Vous combinerez la gestion d'équipe avec un travail technique pratique, en garantissant que les systèmes critiques de l'entreprise EFG restent sécurisés, résilients et toujours connectés dans un environnement de private banking exigeant. Responsabilités principales 1. Leadership et gestion
- Diriger, coacher et développer une équipe de trois ingénieurs réseau, en favorisant une culture de responsabilité, de collaboration et d'amélioration continue.
- Combiner la direction d'équipe avec un travail technique pratique sur des incidents et des projets complexes.
- Superviser les opérations quotidiennes de réseau et de proxy, y compris la gestion des incidents, des problèmes et des changements.
- Planifier et coordonner les mises à niveau, les migrations et les activités de cycle de vie du réseau et du proxy en alignement avec les exigences commerciales et de sécurité.
- Gérer les escalades, en garantissant une résolution rapide des incidents majeurs et une communication claire avec les parties prenantes.
- Gérer et examiner les fournisseurs tiers et les contrats de fournisseurs, en garantissant la qualité du service, la rentabilité et l'adhésion aux SLA.
- Assurer la conformité avec les politiques internes ainsi que les exigences réglementaires, de sécurité et d'audit liées à l'infrastructure de réseau et de sécurité. 2. Proxy / Secure Web Gateway (Zscaler)
- Collaborer étroitement avec les équipes de sécurité pour définir, mettre en œuvre et maintenir les politiques de sécurité, y compris le filtrage des URL, le filtrage des applications cloud et des fichiers, DLP et contrôle d'accès.
- Configurer, exploiter et maintenir les solutions Zscaler (ZIA, ZPA) et les composants associés tels que SIPA, pare-feu cloud, fichiers PAC, NSS, ZCC...
- Gérer les appareils d'entreprise à l'aide de Zscaler Client Connector (ZCC), en garantissant une connectivité sécurisée et fiable.
- Analyser et résoudre les problèmes liés à Zscaler en analysant les journaux, en effectuant des traces et en appliquant des actions correctives.
- Analyser les traces de paquets de réseau (PCAP), les journaux Fiddler et les en-têtes HTTP/HTTPS pour identifier et résoudre les problèmes complexes de connectivité et de performances.
- Proposer et mettre en œuvre des améliorations de la performance, de la capacité, de la scalabilité et de la sécurité du réseau et du proxy. 3. Ingénierie et opérations de réseau
- Fournir un support technique de deuxième et troisième niveau pour les services de réseau et associés.
- Configurer, installer et maintenir les appareils et services de réseau (par exemple, routeurs, commutateurs, pare-feu, équilibreur de charge, VPN, QoS).
- Supporter et maintenir la connectivité réseau pour les flux de données de marché financier et autres services sensibles à la latence.
- Mettre en œuvre et maintenir un processus d'amélioration continue en définissant, en documentant et en appliquant les normes, procédures et meilleures pratiques de réseau et de proxy.
- Interagir avec les fournisseurs et les partenaires externes (intégrateurs, fournisseurs de télécommunications, fournisseurs de données de marché, etc.) pour concevoir, mettre en œuvre et supporter les solutions de réseau.
- Participer à la rotation 24x7 on-call / on-duty (piquet) pour supporter l'infrastructure critique.
- Surveiller les performances du réseau et du proxy, en garantissant la disponibilité, la fiabilité et la sécurité du système.
- Surveiller l'utilisation des ressources système, les tendances et la capacité, et planifier les mises à niveau ou les optimisations en conséquence. Compétences et expérience Contexte - 6–10 ans d'expérience dans le domaine des réseaux dans des environnements complexes et internationaux.
- Connaissance approfondie de l'architecture de réseau d'entreprise et de la sécurité réseau.
- Expérience professionnelle avec les technologies Cisco et Cisco ACI; l'expérience dans les services financiers est un plus. Compétences techniques
- Expert dans la mise en œuvre et la résolution de problèmes de LAN/WAN/MAN.
- Expérience approfondie avec les pare-feu (Fortinet et/ou Check Point), VPN, IPSec et tunnels GRE.
- Expertise prouvée avec Zscaler ZIA/ZPA et ZCC sur les appareils d'entreprise.
- Compréhension approfondie de la conception de la connectivité réseau et cloud.
- Capacité à analyser les traces de paquets de réseau (PCAP), les journaux Fiddler et les en-têtes HTTP/HTTPS.
- Connaissance de Python ou d'un autre langage de script pour l'automatisation; la certification Zscaler est un plus. Compétences douces et langues
- Compétences de communication avancées; capable de travailler efficacement avec des parties prenantes techniques et non techniques.
- Expérience dans la gestion de fournisseurs tiers et d'équipes de support internes.
- Rigoureux, autonome, proactif et orienté service, avec de solides compétences de documentation.
- Courant en français et en anglais, écrit et parlé. Nos valeurs
- Responsabilité: Prendre en charge les tâches et les défis, ainsi que rechercher l'amélioration continue.
- Hands-on: Être proactif pour fournir rapidement des résultats de haute qualité.
- Passionné: Être engagé et s'efforcer d'excellence.
- Solution-driven: Se concentrer sur les résultats des clients et traiter les clients équitablement avec un esprit de risque.
- Partnership-oriented: Promouvoir la collaboration et le travail d'équipe; travailler ensemble avec un esprit entrepreneurial. Candidature
- Veuillez joindre une lettre de motivation à votre CV lors de la soumission de votre candidature.
- Si vous souhaitez postuler à ce poste, veuillez utiliser le lien de candidature désigné.

summary:
General Information

  • Department: Information Technology – Infrastructure
  • Work Time Percentage: 100%
  • Location: Geneva

Our Company

EFG International is a global private banking group, offering private banking and asset management services. We serve clients in over 40 locations worldwide. EFG International offers a stimulating and dynamic work environment and strives to be an employer of choice.

EFG is committed to providing an equitable and inclusive working environment that is founded on the principle of mutual respect. Joining our team means experiencing a supportive environment, where your contributions are valued and recognised. We strongly believe that the diversity of our teams gives us a competitive advantage by fostering better decision-making and greater innovation.

Our Purpose and Mission

Empowering entrepreneurial minds to create value – today and for the future.

We are a private bank, offering personalised solutions on a global scale to private and institutional clients. Our sustainable success is based on our talents and on how we partner with our clients and communities to create lasting value.

Job Description

Role and Team

Within the Information Technology Department, you will join a team of 12 engineers based in Geneva and collaborate with IT colleagues in more than 30 countries. Under the supervision of the IT Infrastructure Support Manager, you will lead a team of three network engineers.

You will combine people management with hands-on engineering, ensuring that EFG’s business-critical systems remain secure, resilient, and always connected in a demanding private banking environment.

Main Responsibilities

1. Leadership & Management

  • Lead, coach and develop a team of three network engineers, fostering a culture of accountability, collaboration and continuous improvement.
  • Combine team leadership with hands-on technical work on complex incidents and projects.
  • Oversee day-to-day network and proxy operations, including incident, problem and change management.
  • Plan and coordinate network and proxy upgrades, migrations and lifecycle activities in alignment with business and security requirements.
  • Manage escalations, ensuring timely resolution of major incidents and clear communication with stakeholders.
  • Manage and review third-party providers and vendor contracts, ensuring service quality, cost effectiveness and adherence to SLAs.
  • Ensure compliance with internal policies as well as regulatory, security and audit requirements relevant to network and security infrastructure.

2. Proxy / Secure Web Gateway (Zscaler)

  • Collaborate closely with security teams to define, implement and maintain security policies, including URL filtering, cloud application and file filtering, DLP and access control.
  • Configure, operate and maintain Zscaler solutions (ZIA, ZPA) and related components such as SIPA, cloud firewall, PAC files, NSS, ZCC...
  • Manage corporate devices using Zscaler Client Connector (ZCC), ensuring secure and reliable connectivity.
  • Troubleshoot and resolve Zscaler-related issues by analysing logs, performing traces and applying appropriate corrective actions.
  • Analyse network packet traces (PCAP), Fiddler logs and HTTP/HTTPS headers to identify and resolve complex connectivity and performance issues.
  • Proactively suggest and implement improvements to network and proxy performance, capacity, scalability and security posture.

3. Network Engineering & Operations

  • Provide 2nd and 3rd level technical support for network and related services.
  • Configure, install and maintain network devices and services (e.g. routers, switches, firewalls, load balancers, VPN, QoS).
  • Support and maintain network connectivity for financial market data feeds and other latency-sensitive services.
  • Implement and maintain a continuous improvement process by defining, documenting and enforcing network and proxy standards, procedures and best practices.
  • Interface with external suppliers and partners (integrators, telecom providers, market data vendors, etc.) to design, implement and support network solutions.
  • Participate in 24x7 on-call / on-duty rotation (piquet) to support critical infrastructure.
  • Monitor network and proxy performance, ensuring system availability, reliability and security.
  • Monitor system resource utilisation, trends and capacity, and plan upgrades or optimisations accordingly.

Skills and Experience

Background

  • 6–10 years of experience in networking in complex, international environments.
  • Strong knowledge of enterprise networking architecture and network security.
  • Professional experience with Cisco technologies and Cisco ACI; financial services experience is a plus.

Technical Skills

  • Expert in LAN/WAN/MAN implementation and troubleshooting.
  • Strong experience with firewalls (Fortinet and/or Check Point), VPN, IPSec and GRE tunnels.
  • Proven expertise with Zscaler ZIA/ZPA and ZCC on corporate devices.
  • Solid understanding of network and cloud connectivity design.
  • Ability to analyse network traces (PCAP), Fiddler logs and HTTP/HTTPS headers.
  • Knowledge of Python or another scripting language for automation; Zscaler certification is a plus.

Soft Skills & Languages

  • Strong communication skills; able to work effectively with technical and non-technical stakeholders.
  • Experience managing third-party providers and internal support teams.
  • Rigorous, autonomous, proactive and service-oriented, with strong documentation skills.
  • Fluent in French and English, written and spoken.

Our Values

  • Accountability: Taking ownership for tasks and challenges, as well as seeking continuous improvement.
  • Hands-on: Being proactive to rapidly deliver high-quality results.
  • Passionate: Being committed and striving for excellence.
  • Solution-driven: Focusing on client outcomes and treating clients fairly with a risk-aware mindset.
  • Partnership-oriented: Promoting collaboration and teamwork; working together with an entrepreneurial spirit.

Application

  1. Please ensure you attach a cover letter to your CV when submitting your application.
  2. Should you wish to apply for this position, please use the designated application link.

jobs.title: Strategic Planning Officer
jobs.description:
Our Company

EFG International is a global private banking group, offering private banking and asset management services. We serve clients in over 40 locations worldwide. EFG International offers a stimulating and dynamic work environment and strives to be an employer of choice.

Our Purpose and Mission

Empowering entrepreneurial minds to create value – today and for the future.

Job Description

The Strategic Planning Officer will be part of the Strategy & Corporate Development Team in Lugano and will contribute to run an integrated planning, reporting and performance review process to facilitate value-driven business decision-making. In his role as a business partner and challenger of business performance he will focus on value-added decision support through granular analysis of performance root causes and by providing insights on value creation levers.

The Strategic Planning Officer will play an active role in the business performance dialogues, support business development and provide value-added decision support using data modelling and forecasting intelligence.

Main responsibilities

- Business analyst and power user of MI data

- Establish and compile presentations to senior management

- Take active role in the business performance dialogues

- Design and maintain data models for analysis and forecasting

- Active collaboration with Planning & Controlling unit during budgeting and forecasting process

- Develop strong relationship with business management and business controllers to build a role as business partner

- Develop recurring benchmarking analysis in collaboration with external advisors

-
Key collaboration in corporate development projects and strategic initiatives, including M&A transactions

Skills and experience

- Have professional experience in Financial Services Industry, in particular in Corporate Finance activities

- Ability to understand large datasets and experience of data modelling, providing accurate data analysis

- Power user of MS-Excel and MS-PowerPoint; Knowledge of using Excel Macros, VBA, Python, Power BI as a plus

- Quick learner, accurate and efficient

- Proactive attitude and willingness to take on new knowledge and skills

- Ability to work under pressure and adapt to unforeseen work demands

- Good communication skills to communicate effectively with internal stakeholders at all levels

-
Fluent in English and fluent in Italian

Our Values

- Accountability : Taking ownership for tasks and challenges, as well as seeking continuous improvement

- Hands-on : Being proactive to rapidly deliver high-quality results

- Passionate : Being committed and striving for excellence

- Solution-driven : Focusing on client outcomes and treating clients fairly with a risk-aware mindset

- Partnership-oriented : Promoting collaboration and teamwork. Working together with an entrepreneurial spirit.

descriptionByLocale.en:
Our Company

EFG International is a global private banking group, offering private banking and asset management services. We serve clients in over 40 locations worldwide. EFG International offers a stimulating and dynamic work environment and strives to be an employer of choice.

Our Purpose and Mission

Empowering entrepreneurial minds to create value – today and for the future.

Job Description

The Strategic Planning Officer will be part of the Strategy & Corporate Development Team in Lugano and will contribute to run an integrated planning, reporting and performance review process to facilitate value-driven business decision-making. In his role as a business partner and challenger of business performance he will focus on value-added decision support through granular analysis of performance root causes and by providing insights on value creation levers.

The Strategic Planning Officer will play an active role in the business performance dialogues, support business development and provide value-added decision support using data modelling and forecasting intelligence.

Main responsibilities
- Business analyst and power user of MI data
- Establish and compile presentations to senior management
- Take active role in the business performance dialogues
- Design and maintain data models for analysis and forecasting
- Active collaboration with Planning & Controlling unit during budgeting and forecasting process
- Develop strong relationship with business management and business controllers to build a role as business partner
- Develop recurring benchmarking analysis in collaboration with external advisors

-
Key collaboration in corporate development projects and strategic initiatives, including M&A transactions

Skills and experience
- Have professional experience in Financial Services Industry, in particular in Corporate Finance activities
- Ability to understand large datasets and experience of data modelling, providing accurate data analysis
- Power user of MS-Excel and MS-PowerPoint; Knowledge of using Excel Macros, VBA, Python, Power BI as a plus
- Quick learner, accurate and efficient
- Proactive attitude and willingness to take on new knowledge and skills
- Ability to work under pressure and adapt to unforeseen work demands
- Good communication skills to communicate effectively with internal stakeholders at all levels

-
Fluent in English and fluent in Italian

Our Values
- Accountability : Taking ownership for tasks and challenges, as well as seeking continuous improvement
- Hands-on : Being proactive to rapidly deliver high-quality results
- Passionate : Being committed and striving for excellence
- Solution-driven : Focusing on client outcomes and treating clients fairly with a risk-aware mindset
- Partnership-oriented : Promoting collaboration and teamwork. Working together with an entrepreneurial spirit.
descriptionByLocale.it:
La nostra azienda EFG International è un gruppo globale di private banking, che offre servizi di private banking e gestione patrimoniale. Serviamo clienti in oltre 40 sedi in tutto il mondo. EFG International offre un ambiente di lavoro stimolante e dinamico e si impegna a essere un datore di lavoro di scelta. La nostra missione e il nostro scopo Empowering entrepreneurial minds to create value – today and for the future. Descrizione del lavoro L'Ufficiale di Pianificazione Strategica farà parte del Team di Strategia e Sviluppo Aziendale a Lugano e contribuirà a gestire un processo integrato di pianificazione, reporting e revisione delle prestazioni per facilitare decisioni aziendali guidate dal valore. Nel suo ruolo di partner aziendale e sfidante delle prestazioni aziendali, si concentrerà sul supporto decisionale a valore aggiunto attraverso un'analisi granulare delle cause profonde delle prestazioni e fornendo informazioni approfondite sui fattori di creazione di valore. L'Ufficiale di Pianificazione Strategica svolgerà un ruolo attivo nei dialoghi sulle prestazioni aziendali, supporterà lo sviluppo aziendale e fornirà supporto decisionale a valore aggiunto utilizzando la modellazione dei dati e l'intelligence previsionale. Responsabilità principali
- Analista aziendale e utente avanzato dei dati MI
- Creare e compilare presentazioni per la direzione
- Partecipare attivamente ai dialoghi sulle prestazioni aziendali
- Progettare e mantenere modelli di dati per l'analisi e la previsione
- Collaborazione attiva con l'unità di Pianificazione e Controllo durante il processo di budgeting e previsione
- Sviluppare una forte relazione con la gestione aziendale e i responsabili dei controlli per costruire un ruolo di partner aziendale
- Sviluppare analisi di benchmarking ricorrenti in collaborazione con consulenti esterni
- Collaborazione chiave in progetti di sviluppo aziendale e iniziative strategiche, comprese transazioni M&A Requisiti
- Avere esperienza professionale nel settore dei servizi finanziari, in particolare nelle attività di Corporate Finance
- Capacità di comprendere grandi dataset e esperienza di modellazione dei dati, fornendo analisi accurate dei dati
- Utente avanzato di MS-Excel e MS-PowerPoint; Conoscenza dell'uso di Excel Macros, VBA, Python, Power BI come plus
- Velocità di apprendimento, accuratezza ed efficienza
- Atteggiamento proattivo e disponibilità a prendere nuove conoscenze e competenze
- Capacità di lavorare sotto pressione e adattarsi a richieste di lavoro impreviste
- Buone capacità di comunicazione per comunicare efficacemente con gli stakeholder interni a tutti i livelli
- Fluente in inglese e fluente in italiano I nostri valori
- Accountability: prendere la proprietà di compiti e sfide, nonché cercare il miglioramento continuo
- Hands-on: essere proattivi per fornire rapidamente risultati di alta qualità
- Passionate: essere impegnati e impegnarsi per l'eccellenza
- Solution-driven: focalizzarsi sugli esiti dei clienti e trattare i clienti in modo equo con una mentalità consapevole del rischio
- Partnership-oriented: promuovere la collaborazione e il lavoro di squadra. Lavorare insieme con uno spirito imprenditoriale.
descriptionByLocale.de:
Unser Unternehmen EFG International ist eine globale Private-Banking-Gruppe, die Private-Banking- und Vermögensverwaltungsdienstleistungen anbietet. Wir bedienen Kunden in über 40 Standorten weltweit. EFG International bietet eine stimulierende und dynamische Arbeitsumgebung und bemüht sich, ein Arbeitgeber der Wahl zu sein. Unser Zweck und unsere Mission Empowering entrepreneurial minds to create value – today and for the future. Job-Beschreibung Der Strategische Planungsbeauftragte wird Teil des Teams Strategie und Unternehmensentwicklung in Lugano sein und dazu beitragen, einen integrierten Planungs-, Berichterstellungs- und Leistungsüberprüfungsprozess zu betreiben, um wertgetriebene Geschäftsentscheidungen zu erleichtern. In seiner Rolle als Geschäftspartner und Herausforderer der Geschäftsleistung wird er sich auf die wertschöpfende Entscheidungsunterstützung durch granulare Analyse der Leistungsursachen und durch die Bereitstellung von Erkenntnissen über Wertschöpfungshebel konzentrieren. Der Strategische Planungsbeauftragte wird eine aktive Rolle in den Geschäftsdialogen spielen, die Geschäftsentwicklung unterstützen und eine wertschöpfende Entscheidungsunterstützung unter Verwendung von Datenmodellierung und Prognoseintelligenz bereitstellen. Hauptverantwortungen
- Unternehmensanalyst und Power-User von MI-Daten
- Erstellen und Zusammenstellen von Präsentationen für das Senior-Management
- Aktive Teilnahme an den Geschäftsdialogen
- Entwerfen und Warten von Datenmodellen für Analyse und Prognose
- Aktive Zusammenarbeit mit der Planungs- und Controlling-Einheit während des Budgetierungs- und Prognoseprozesses
- Aufbau einer starken Beziehung zu den Geschäftsführern und Controllern, um eine Rolle als Geschäftspartner aufzubauen
- Entwicklung von regelmäßigen Benchmarking-Analysen in Zusammenarbeit mit externen Beratern
- Schlüsselrolle bei der Zusammenarbeit an Unternehmensentwicklungsprojekten und strategischen Initiativen, einschließlich M&A-Transaktionen Anforderungen
- Berufserfahrung in der Finanzdienstleistungsbranche, insbesondere in Corporate-Finance-Aktivitäten
- Fähigkeit, große Datensätze zu verstehen und Erfahrung in der Datenmodellierung, um genaue Datenanalysen bereitzustellen
- Power-User von MS-Excel und MS-PowerPoint; Kenntnis der Verwendung von Excel-Makros, VBA, Python, Power BI als Plus
- Schnelle Lernfähigkeit, Genauigkeit und Effizienz
- Proaktive Einstellung und Bereitschaft, neue Kenntnisse und Fähigkeiten zu erwerben
- Fähigkeit, unter Druck zu arbeiten und sich an unvorhergesehene Arbeitsanforderungen anzupassen
- Gute Kommunikationsfähigkeiten, um effektiv mit internen Stakeholdern auf allen Ebenen zu kommunizieren
- Fließend in Englisch und fließend in Italienisch Unsere Werte
- Accountability: Übernahme von Verantwortung für Aufgaben und Herausforderungen sowie kontinuierliche Verbesserung
- Hands-on: proaktiv sein, um schnell Ergebnisse von hoher Qualität zu liefern
- Passionate: engagiert sein und sich für Exzellenz einsetzen
- Solution-driven: Fokus auf Kundenergebnisse und faire Behandlung von Kunden mit einem risikobewussten Mindset
- Partnership-oriented: Förderung von Zusammenarbeit und Teamarbeit. Zusammenarbeiten mit einem unternehmerischen Geist.
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Notre entreprise EFG International est un groupe mondial de banque privée, offrant des services de banque privée et de gestion de patrimoine. Nous servons des clients dans plus de 40 sites à travers le monde. EFG International offre un environnement de travail stimulant et dynamique et s'efforce d'être un employeur de choix. Notre objectif et notre mission Empowering entrepreneurial minds to create value – today and for the future. Description du poste L'Officier de planification stratégique fera partie de l'équipe Stratégie et développement des entreprises à Lugano et contribuera à gérer un processus intégré de planification, de reporting et d'examen des performances pour faciliter les décisions commerciales axées sur la valeur. Dans son rôle de partenaire commercial et de challenger de la performance commerciale, il se concentrera sur le soutien à la décision à valeur ajoutée grâce à une analyse granulaire des causes profondes de la performance et en fournissant des informations sur les facteurs de création de valeur. L'Officier de planification stratégique jouera un rôle actif dans les dialogues sur la performance commerciale, soutiendra le développement commercial et fournira un soutien à la décision à valeur ajoutée en utilisant la modélisation des données et l'intelligence prévisionnelle. Responsabilités principales
- Analyste commercial et utilisateur expérimenté des données MI
- Établir et compiler des présentations pour la direction
- Prendre un rôle actif dans les dialogues sur la performance commerciale
- Concevoir et maintenir des modèles de données pour l'analyse et la prévision
- Collaboration active avec l'unité de planification et de contrôle pendant le processus de budgétisation et de prévision
- Développer une relation solide avec la direction commerciale et les contrôleurs pour construire un rôle de partenaire commercial
- Développer des analyses de benchmarking récurrentes en collaboration avec des conseillers externes
- Collaboration clé dans les projets de développement des entreprises et les initiatives stratégiques, y compris les transactions M&A Exigences
- Expérience professionnelle dans le secteur des services financiers, en particulier dans les activités de finance d'entreprise
- Capacité à comprendre de grands ensembles de données et expérience de la modélisation des données, fournissant des analyses de données précises
- Utilisateur expérimenté de MS-Excel et MS-PowerPoint; Connaissance de l'utilisation des macros Excel, VBA, Python, Power BI comme plus
- Capacité d'apprentissage rapide, précision et efficacité
- Attitude proactive et volonté de prendre de nouvelles connaissances et compétences
- Capacité à travailler sous pression et à s'adapter à des demandes de travail imprévues
- Bonnes compétences en communication pour communiquer efficacement avec les parties prenantes internes à tous les niveaux
- Courant en anglais et courant en italien Nos valeurs
- Accountability: prendre la responsabilité des tâches et des défis, ainsi que rechercher l'amélioration continue
- Hands-on: être proactif pour fournir rapidement des résultats de haute qualité
- Passionate: être engagé et s'efforcer d'excellence
- Solution-driven: se concentrer sur les résultats des clients et traiter les clients de manière équitable avec un esprit de risque
- Partnership-oriented: promouvoir la collaboration et le travail d'équipe. Travailler ensemble avec un esprit entrepreneurial.

jobs.title: Audit Manager - Temporary 6 months
jobs.description:
## Main Responsibilities

## INTERNAL AUDIT STANDARDS

- In line with EFG-ASD Internal Audit Charter to ensure that EFG International’s operations are conducted according to the highest standards by providing an independent, objective assurance function and by advising on best practice.

- Ensure that professional standards and ASD methodology are applied in carrying out audit assignments.

- Comply with the Global Internal Audit Standards as prescribed by The Institute of Internal Auditors.

- Comply with the EFG International Regulations including GD 9 01 001 "Internal Audit Reports and Management’s Monitoring of Pending Issues" and the "Group Business Code of Conduct" as outlined in POL 6 02 003.

## RISK MANAGEMENT

- Assist EFG International to accomplish its objectives by evaluating the effectiveness of risk management, control and governance processes and making recommendations for improvement.

- Assess potential risks to the Bank’s operations during the execution of audit mandates and update the EFG International entity risk assessment where appropriate.

- Ensure that there is adequate audit coverage given to all significant risk activities.

## INTERNAL AUDIT PROCESS

- Work on assigned audits in accordance with the Annual Audit Plan submitted to the Audit Committee.

- Confirm adherence with provisions and requirements of the ASD internal audit manual.

- Establish a Continuous Monitoring approach, including regular engagement with stakeholders.

- Review the adequacy of controls established to ensure compliance with policies, plans, procedures, and business objectives.

- Review established procedures and systems and propose improvements.

- Assist and advise management on risks not being properly managed and having an adverse impact on the Internal Control System (ICS) of the Bank.

- Appraise the use of resources regarding efficiency and effectiveness.

- Document and report progress on planned audit tasks on a timely basis.

- Discuss findings, recommendation and overall audit rating with the Chief Auditor/Deputy Chief Auditor or Regional Head of Audit prior to finalization of audit reports and its distribution to the management.

- Ensure that all Audit objectives mentioned in the Audit Planning Document have been covered and sufficient work papers are in place to substantiate audit work performed

## QUALITY ASSURANCE PROCESS

- Ensure the audit working papers meet ASD quality standards. Perform quality assurance self-assessments upon completion of the audit.

- Critically appraise and edit the audit report to ensure compliance with report standards, including format, presentation, sentence structure, spelling, page numbering, and content completeness.

- Support ASD in attaining satisfactory KPI performance levels.

## AUDIT COORDINATION

- Coordinate with members of the ASD audit team when working on assignments.

- Interact with global colleagues and be respectful of cultural differences.

- Provide support and constructive feedback to team members to enhance their capabilities.

- AUDIT ADMINISTRATION

- Assist in the follow up on the status of significant actions taken by the management in implementing the audit recommendations.

- Assist the Chief Auditor/Deputy Chief Auditor or Regional Head of Audit in preparing quarterly audit activity reports to the Audit Committee.

- Participate in ad hoc investigations or reviews requested by the Audit Committee and Management.

## Skills and experience

- At least 8 to 10 years’ audit and related work experience within the private banking and financial services environment. (e.g. big 4 environment or internal audit function of major private bank in Switzerland)

- Strong track record of conducting independent internal audits regarding clients facing (AML/KYC, Suitability) and operational activities.

-  Strong analytical, communication and report   ‑   writing skills.

-  High level of independence, integrity, objectivity and professional judgement.

-  Ability to work effectively in teams and to engage constructively with management at all levels.

-  Capacity to operate autonomously and deliver to tight deadlines over a defined 6   ‑   month period.

- Solid understanding of financial instruments, experience in auditing global markets, operations activities as well as knowledge of risk management frameworks related to market, credit, counterparty, operational resilience and liquidity risks

- Familiarity with treasury operations and management, including cash flow management, funding strategies, capital allocation and interested rate risk management.

- A university degree, preferably a Master’s degree in Business Administration.

- A professional auditing qualification, Certified Internal Auditor or Chartered Accountant or equivalent.

## Our Values

-  Accountability : Taking ownership for tasks and challenges, as well as seeking continuous improvement

-  Hands-on : Being proactive to rapidly deliver high-quality results

-  Passionate : Being committed and striving for excellence

-  Solution-driven : Focusing on client outcomes and treating clients fairly with a risk-aware mindset

-  Partnership-oriented : Promoting collaboration and teamwork. Working together with an entrepreneurial spirit
